<svg style="left: 50%;
        top: 50%;
        position: absolute;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 187.3 93.7" height="300px" width="400px">
      <path d="M93.9,46.4c9.3,9.5,13.8,17.9,23.5,17.9s17.5-7.8,17.5-17.5s-7.8-17.6-17.5-17.5c-9.7,0.1-13.3,7.2-22.1,17.1 				c-8.9,8.8-15.7,17.9-25.4,17.9s-17.5-7.8-17.5-17.5s7.8-17.5,17.5-17.5S86.2,38.6,93.9,46.4z" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="4" fill="none" id="outline" stroke="#4E4FEB"></path>
      <path d="M93.9,46.4c9.3,9.5,13.8,17.9,23.5,17.9s17.5-7.8,17.5-17.5s-7.8-17.6-17.5-17.5c-9.7,0.1-13.3,7.2-22.1,17.1 				c-8.9,8.8-15.7,17.9-25.4,17.9s-17.5-7.8-17.5-17.5s7.8-17.5,17.5-17.5S86.2,38.6,93.9,46.4z" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="4" stroke="#4E4FEB" fill="none" opacity="0.05" id="outline-bg"></path>
    </svg>
<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by SouravBandyopadhyay - Tags: loading, loader, spinner, spin, loading animation, Infinite Spin */
#outline {
  stroke-dasharray: 2.42777px, 242.77666px;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  -webkit-animation: anim 1.6s linear infinite;
  animation: anim 1.6s linear infinite;
}

@-webkit-keyframes anim {
  12.5% {
    stroke-dasharray: 33.98873px, 242.77666px;
    stroke-dashoffset: -26.70543px;
  }

  43.75% {
    stroke-dasharray: 84.97183px, 242.77666px;
    stroke-dashoffset: -84.97183px;
  }

  100% {
    stroke-dasharray: 2.42777px, 242.77666px;
    stroke-dashoffset: -240.34889px;
  }
}

@keyframes anim {
  12.5% {
    stroke-dasharray: 33.98873px, 242.77666px;
    stroke-dashoffset: -26.70543px;
  }

  43.75% {
    stroke-dasharray: 84.97183px, 242.77666px;
    stroke-dashoffset: -84.97183px;
  }

  100% {
    stroke-dasharray: 2.42777px, 242.77666px;
    stroke-dashoffset: -240.34889px;
  }
}

</style>

Description: A gradient animated button with a coral color theme, rounded corners, and a dynamic ripple effect on click, providing enhanced feedback and visual transition when hovered or activated.

Category: Buttons

Tags: button, gradient, rounded, animation, hover, modern, 3d

Colors: #ff7f50, #ffa07a, #ffffff, #000000

<button class="complex-animated-button">Click me</button>

<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by Satwinder04 - Tags: button */
.complex-animated-button {
  --primary-color: #ff7f50;
  --secondary-color: #ffa07a;
  --border-radius: 8px;
  --shadow-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
  --shadow-offset: 2px;
  --shadow-blur: 4px;
  --ripple-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
  background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--primary-color), var(--secondary-color));
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--border-radius);
  color: white;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  padding: 1rem 2rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-offset) var(--shadow-offset) var(--shadow-blur) var(--shadow-color);
  transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out, background 0.3s ease-in-out;
}

.complex-animated-button:hover {
  transform: scale(1);
  background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--secondary-color), var(--primary-color));
}

.complex-animated-button:focus {
  outline: none;
}

.complex-animated-button:active {
  animation: ripple 0.6s ease-out;
}

@keyframes ripple {
  to {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 0;
  }
}

.complex-animated-button::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  background-color: var(--ripple-color);
  border-radius: 50%;
  opacity: 0.5;
}

.complex-animated-button:active::after {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  transition: width 0.3s ease-out, height 0.3s ease-out;
}

</style>

Description: A multi-gradient button with a dynamic, 3D ring effect that pulses on idle and illuminates when hovered, featuring contrasting text colors and an elevated look through sophisticated shadows.

Category: Buttons

Tags: button, gradient, 3d, hover effect, modern, animation, rounded, purple

Colors: #814fd1, #decbe2, #4f83d1, #6f00ff, #4f63d1, #313133, #260b35

<button>
  Button
</button>
<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by linkb15 - Tags: button */
button {
  --min-width: 180px;
  --min-height: 42px;
  --ring-min-size: 20px;
  --ring-max-size: 150px;
  --ring-width: 3px;
  --main-bg-color: #814fd1;
  --gradient-bg-color-1: rgb(222, 203, 226);
  --gradient-bg-color-2: rgb(79, 131, 209);
  --ring-color: #6f00ff;
  --shadow-color: rgba(79, 99, 209, 0.64);
  --hover-shadow-color: rgba(79, 99, 209, 0.64);
  --main-fg-color: #313133;
  --hover-fg-color: rgb(38, 11, 53);
  min-width: var(--min-width);
  min-height: var(--min-height);
  font-size: 17px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--main-fg-color);
  background: var(--main-bg-color);
  background: linear-gradient(66deg, var(--gradient-bg-color-1) 0%, var(--gradient-bg-color-2) 100%);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 999px;
  box-shadow: 12px 2px 24px var(--shadow-color);
  transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out 0s;
  cursor: pointer;
  outline: none;
  position: relative;
  padding: 10px;
}

button::before {
  content: '';
  border-radius: 999px;
  min-width: calc(var(--min-width) + 12px);
  min-height: calc(var(--min-height) + 12px);
  border: var(--ring-width) solid var(--ring-color);
  box-shadow: 0 0 60px var(--hover-shadow-color);
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: all .3s ease-in-out 0s;
}

button:hover, .button:focus {
  color: var(--hover-fg-color);
  transform: translateY(-6px);
}

button:active {
  color: var(--main-fg-color);
  transform: scale(0.95);
}

button:active::before {
  border: 0px solid var(--ring-color);
}

button:hover::before, button:focus::before {
  opacity: 1;
}

/* ring */
button::after {
  content: '';
  width: var(--ring-min-size);
  height: var(--ring-min-size);
  border-radius: 100%;
  border: var(--ring-width) solid var(--ring-color);
  position: absolute;
  z-index: -1;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  animation: ring 1.5s infinite;
}

button:hover::after, button:focus::after {
  animation: none;
  display: none;
}

@keyframes ring {
  0% {
    width: var(--ring-min-size);
    height: var(--ring-min-size);
    opacity: 0.5;
  }

  100% {
    width: var(--ring-max-size);
    height: var(--ring-max-size);
    opacity: 0;
  }
}
</style>

Description: A bold and vibrant gradient button with a sleek, animated rainbow border that shifts colors continuously, creating a dynamic visual effect on a dark base for contrast and visibility.

Category: Buttons

Tags: button, gradient, animation, colorful, hover, modern, bold

Colors: #000000, #272727, #fb0094, #0000ff, #00ff00, #ffff00, #ff0000

<button class="button">
  Button
</button>
<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by JaydipPrajapati1910 - Tags: gradient, button, gradients, effects, css effect */
.button {
  width: 140px;
  height: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 0px 15px;
  background-color: red;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: none;
  color: white;
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 900;
  transition-duration: .2s;
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, #000, #272727);
}

.button:before, .button:after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: -2px;
  top: -2px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: linear-gradient(45deg, #fb0094, #0000ff, #00ff00,#ffff00, #ff0000, #fb0094, 
		#0000ff, #00ff00,#ffff00, #ff0000);
  background-size: 400%;
  width: calc(100% + 4px);
  height: calc(100% + 4px);
  z-index: -1;
  animation: steam 20s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes steam {
  0% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }

  50% {
    background-position: 400% 0;
  }

  100% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}

.button:after {
  filter: blur(50px);
}


</style>

Write the code to reproduce this UI component exactly as shown.

Description: A lively button designed for uploading, featuring a bright green background with bold white text, rounded edges, and a subtle arrow animation on hover indicating a download action.

Category: Buttons

Tags: button, hover, animated, green, blue, rounded, bold

Colors: #4CC713, #1a60a2, #bdd3ef, #eff1f7

<button class="buttonDownload">Upload</button>
<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by AkashKobal - Tags: button */
.buttonDownload {
  display: inline-block;
  position: relative;
  padding: 10px 25px;
  background-color: #4CC713;
  color: white;
  font-family: sans-serif;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  text-align: center;
  text-indent: 15px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 2em;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.buttonDownload:hover {
  background-color: #1a60a2;
  color: white;
}

.buttonDownload:before, .buttonDownload:after {
  content: ' ';
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  left: 15px;
  top: 52%;
}

.buttonDownload:before {
  width: 10px;
  height: 2px;
  border-style: solid;
  border-width: 0 2px 2px;
}

.buttonDownload:after {
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  margin-left: 3px;
  margin-top: -7px;
  border-style: solid;
  border-width: 4px 4px 0 4px;
  border-color: transparent;
  border-top-color: inherit;
  animation: downloadArrow 1s linear infinite;
  animation-play-state: paused;
}

.buttonDownload:hover:before {
  border-color: #bdd3ef;
}

.buttonDownload:hover:after {
  border-top-color: #eff1f7;
  animation-play-state: running;
}

@keyframes downloadArrow {
  0% {
    margin-top: -7px;
    opacity: 1;
  }

  0.001% {
    margin-top: -15px;
    opacity: 0.4;
  }

  50% {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  100% {
    margin-top: 0;
    opacity: 0.4;
  }
}

</style>

<button class="btn-56">Button</button>

<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by doniaskima - Tags: button, animated */
.btn-56,
.btn-56 *,
.btn-56 :after,
.btn-56 :before,
.btn-56:after,
.btn-56:before {
  border: 0 solid;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.btn-56 {
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  -webkit-appearance: button;
  background-color: #000;
  background-image: none;
  color: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont,
    Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif,
    Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
  font-size: 100%;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0;
  -webkit-mask-image: -webkit-radial-gradient(#000, #fff);
  padding: 0;
}

.btn-56:disabled {
  cursor: default;
}

.btn-56:-moz-focusring {
  outline: auto;
}

.btn-56 svg {
  display: block;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.btn-56 [hidden] {
  display: none;
}

.btn-56 {
  border: 1px solid;
  border-radius: 999px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  display: block;
  font-weight: 900;
  -webkit-mask-image: none;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 1.2rem 3rem;
  position: relative;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.btn-56:hover {
  -webkit-animation: pulse 0.5s;
  animation: pulse 0.5s;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2em transparent;
}

@-webkit-keyframes pulse {
  0% {
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #fff;
  }
}

@keyframes pulse {
  0% {
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #fff;
  }
}

</style>

/* From Uiverse.io by kleenpulse - Tags: gradient, button */
.btn {
  --border-color: linear-gradient(-45deg, #ffae00, #7e03aa, #00fffb);
  --border-width: .125em;
  --curve-size: .5em;
  --blur: 30px;
  --bg: #080312;
  --color: #afffff;
  color: var(--color);
    /* use position: relative; so that BG is only for .btn */
  position: relative;
  isolation: isolate;
  display: inline-grid;
  place-content: center;
  padding: .5em 1.5em;
  font-size: 17px;
  border: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  box-shadow: 10px 10px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, .6);
  clip-path: polygon(
            /* Top-left */
            0% var(--curve-size),

            var(--curve-size) 0,
            /* top-right */
            100% 0,
            100% calc(100% - var(--curve-size)),

            /* bottom-right 1 */
            calc(100% - var(--curve-size)) 100%,
            /* bottom-right 2 */
            0 100%);
  transition: color 250ms;
}

.btn::after,
.btn::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
}

.btn::before {
  background: var(--border-color);
  background-size: 300% 300%;
  animation: move-bg7234 5s ease infinite;
  z-index: -2;
}

@keyframes move-bg7234 {
  0% {
    background-position: 31% 0%
  }

  50% {
    background-position: 70% 100%
  }

  100% {
    background-position: 31% 0%
  }
}

.btn::after {
  background: var(--bg);
  z-index: -1;
  clip-path: polygon(
            /* Top-left */
            var(--border-width) 
            calc(var(--curve-size) + var(--border-width) * .5),

            calc(var(--curve-size) + var(--border-width) * .5) var(--border-width),

            /* top-right */
            calc(100% - var(--border-width)) 
            var(--border-width),

            calc(100% - var(--border-width)) 
            calc(100% - calc(var(--curve-size) + var(--border-width) * .5)),

            /* bottom-right 1 */
            calc(100% - calc(var(--curve-size) + var(--border-width) * .5)) calc(100% - var(--border-width)),
            /* bottom-right 2 */
            var(--border-width) calc(100% - var(--border-width)));
  transition: clip-path 500ms;
}

.btn:where(:hover, :focus)::after {
  clip-path: polygon(
                /* Top-left */
                calc(100% - var(--border-width)) 

                calc(100% - calc(var(--curve-size) + var(--border-width) * 0.5)),
    
                calc(100% - var(--border-width))

                var(--border-width),
    
                /* top-right */
                calc(100% - var(--border-width))

                 var(--border-width),
    
                calc(100% - var(--border-width)) 

                calc(100% - calc(var(--curve-size) + var(--border-width) * .5)),
    
                /* bottom-right 1 */
                calc(100% - calc(var(--curve-size) + var(--border-width) * .5)) 
                calc(100% - var(--border-width)),

                /* bottom-right 2 */
                calc(100% - calc(var(--curve-size) + var(--border-width) * 0.5))
                calc(100% - var(--border-width)));
  transition: 200ms;
}

.btn:where(:hover, :focus) {
  color: #fff;
}
</style>

/* From Uiverse.io by Amir10Amir - Tags: gradient, button */
button {
  --border-radius: 25px;
  --border-width: 7px;
  appearance: none;
  position: relative;
  padding: 1em 2em;
  border: 0;
  background-color: #212121;
  font-family: "Roboto", Arial, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #ffff;
  z-index: 2;
}

button::after {
  --m-i: linear-gradient(#000, #000);
  --m-o: content-box, padding-box;
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  padding: var(--border-width);
  background-image: conic-gradient(
		#ff0080,
		#ff0080,
		#ff0080,
		#ff0080,
		#ff0080,
		#ff0080,
		#ff0080
	);
  -webkit-mask-image: var(--m-i), var(--m-i);
  mask-image: var(--m-i), var(--m-i);
  -webkit-mask-origin: var(--m-o);
  mask-origin: var(--m-o);
  mask-clip: var(--m-o);
  mask-composite: exclude;
  -webkit-mask-composite: destination-out;
  filter: hue-rotate(0);
  animation: rotate-hue634 linear 500ms infinite;
  animation-play-state: paused;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border-color: #000;
}

button:hover::after {
  animation-play-state: running;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

@keyframes rotate-hue634 {
  to {
    filter: hue-rotate(1turn);
  }
}

button,
button::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border-radius: 20px;
}

button:active {
  --border-width: 5px;
}

.bn {
  padding: 0.9em 1.6em;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  color: #FFF;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 17px;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 0;
  border-radius: 32px;
}

.bn::after {
  content: "";
  z-index: -1;
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-color: rgb(46, 46, 46);
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.bn::before {
  content: "";
  background: linear-gradient(
    45deg,
    #07d888, #e40851, #2f00ff, #00ff37,
      #ec0808, #2600ff, #0bd157, #2f00ff
);
  position: absolute;
  top: -2px;
  left: -2px;
  background-size: 600%;
  z-index: -1;
  width: calc(100% + 4px);
  height: calc(100% + 4px);
  filter: blur(8px);
  animation: glowing345 20s linear infinite;
  transition: opacity .3s ease-in-out;
  border-radius: 20px;
  opacity: 0;
}

@keyframes glowing345 {
  0% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }

  50% {
    background-position: 400% 0;
  }

  100% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}

.bn:hover::before {
  opacity: 1;
}

.bn:active:after {
  background: transparent;
}

.bn:active {
  color: #000;
  font-weight: bold;
}
</style>

Description: A vibrant gradient button with smooth background transitions from blue to pink and yellow, featuring a ripple animation effect on click and a subtle hover transition to enhance interactivity.

Category: Buttons

Tags: button, gradient, animation, hover, modern, rounded

Colors: #4158d0, #c850c0, #ffcc70, #ffffff

<button class="custom-button">Click Me</button>
<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by PriyanshuGupta28 - Tags: button */
/* styles.css */

/* Reset default styles for the button */
button {
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  padding: 10px 20px;
  font-size: 16px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  cursor: pointer;
  background-color: #4158D0;
  background-image: linear-gradient(43deg, #4158D0 0%, #C850C0 46%, #FFCC70 100%);
  color: #fff;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Add a pseudo-element for the animation effect */
button::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 50%;
  width: 0;
  height: 100%;
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  transition: width 0.3s ease;
}

/* Hover effect for the button */
button:hover::before {
  width: 100%;
}

/* Active effect for the button */
button:active::before {
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
  transition: none;
  animation: ripple 0.4s ease;
}

/* Keyframes animation for the active effect */
@keyframes ripple {
  to {
    transform: scale(2);
    opacity: 0;
  }
}

</style>

Description: A glowing button featuring a dynamic multicolor gradient border animation that becomes visible on hover, with a sleek black base and white text, providing a futuristic and interactive visual effect.

<button type="button" class="glow-on-hover">
  HOVER AND CLICK ME!
</button>
<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by GetYourCode8605 - Tags: button */
.glow-on-hover {
  width: 220px;
  height: 50px;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  color: #fff;
  background: rgb(17, 17, 17);
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.glow-on-hover:before {
  content: '';
  background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff0000, #ff7300, #fffb00, #48ff00, #00ffd5, #002bff, #7a00ff, #ff00c8, #ff0000);
  position: absolute;
  top: -2px;
  left: -2px;
  background-size: 400%;
  z-index: -1;
  filter: blur(5px);
  width: calc(100% + 4px);
  height: calc(100% + 4px);
  animation: glowing_54134 20s linear infinite;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .3s ease-in-out;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.glow-on-hover:active {
  color: #000
}

.glow-on-hover:active:after {
  background: transparent;
}

.glow-on-hover:hover:before {
  opacity: 1;
}

.glow-on-hover:after {
  z-index: -1;
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background: #111;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

@keyframes glowing_54134 {
  0% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }

  50% {
    background-position: 400% 0;
  }

  100% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}
</style>

/* From Uiverse.io by Botwe-Felix5820 - Tags: button, shake */
button {
 height: 3em;
 width: 8em;
 border: none;
 border-radius: 10em;
 background: #016DD9;

}

button:hover {
 animation: shake3856 0.3s linear infinite both;
}

 0% {
  -webkit-transform: translate(0);

 }

 20% {
  -webkit-transform: translate(-2px, 2px);
  transform: translate(-2px, 2px);

  -webkit-transform: translate(-2px, -2px);

 60% {

  transform: translate(2px, 2px);
 }

 80% {
  -webkit-transform: translate(2px, -2px);
  transform: translate(2px, -2px);
 }

 100% {

  transform: translate(0);
 }
}

.button {

    transform: scale(0.9) rotate(-3deg);

}

  HOVER AND CLICK ME!

<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by GetYourCode8605 - Tags: button */
.glow-on-hover {
  width: 220px;
  height: 50px;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  color: #fff;
  background: rgb(17, 17, 17);
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.glow-on-hover:before {
  content: '';
  background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff0000, #ff7300, #fffb00, #48ff00, #00ffd5, #002bff, #7a00ff, #ff00c8, #ff0000);
  position: absolute;
  top: -2px;
  left: -2px;
  background-size: 400%;
  z-index: -1;
  filter: blur(5px);
  width: calc(100% + 4px);
  height: calc(100% + 4px);
  animation: glowing_54134 20s linear infinite;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .3s ease-in-out;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.glow-on-hover:active {
  color: #000
}

.glow-on-hover:active:after {
  background: transparent;
}

.glow-on-hover:hover:before {
  opacity: 1;
}

.glow-on-hover:after {
  z-index: -1;
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background: #111;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

@keyframes glowing_54134 {
  0% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }

  50% {
    background-position: 400% 0;
  }

  100% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}
</style>

/* From Uiverse.io by Botwe-Felix5820 - Tags: button, squishy */
button {

}

button:hover {
 background: #016DD9;

}

@keyframes squeeze3124 {
 0% {
  -webkit-transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1);
  transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1);
 }

 30% {
  -webkit-transform: scale3d(1.25, 0.75, 1);

 40% {

 75% {

 }
}

<style>
/* From Uiverse.io by AnthonyPreite - Tags: gradient, button */
.button {
  position: relative;
  height: 50px;
  width: 130px;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  color: white;
  background: #0f0f0f;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-family: 'Gruppo', sans-serif;
  transition: all .2s ease-out;
}

.button:before {
  position: absolute;
  content: '';
  top: -4px;
  left: -4px;
  height: calc(100% + 8px);
  width: calc(100% + 8px);
  border-radius: 6px;
  z-index: -1;
  opacity: 1;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, hsla(141, 54%, 86%, 1) 0%, hsla(333, 73%, 85%, 1) 25%, hsla(141, 54%, 86%, 1)50%);
  background-size: 400%;
  transition: opacity 1s ease-in-out;
  animation: animate 20s linear infinite;
}

.button:hover {
  transform: scale(1.1);
  color: #0f0f0f;
  opacity: 1;
  transition: all .3s ease-in-out;
}

.button:active {
  background: none;
  color: #000000;
  transform: scale(1);
  transition: all .3s ease-in-out;
}

@keyframes animate {
  0% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }

  50% {
    background-position: 400% 0;
  }

  100% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}

</style>

/* From Uiverse.io by mrhyddenn - Tags: gradient, button, circle */
button {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 100px;
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
  height: 100px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  border: none;
  background: #333;
  color: #e5e5e5;
  font-weight: 600;
  box-shadow: inset 20px 20px 39px #080a10,
  inset -20px -20px 39px #1b263e;
  font-size: 13px;
}

button::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  z-index: -1;
  left: -10px;
  top: -10px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  width: calc(100% + 20px);
  height: calc(100% + 20px);
  background: linear-gradient(35deg, rgb(47, 190, 238), rgb(218, 57, 143), rgb(139, 255, 23));
  filter: blur(10px);
}

button:hover::after {
  animation: rotcirclegr 1s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes rotcirclegr {
  to {
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}
</style>

/* From Uiverse.io by ahmedgamal-hub - Tags: button, animated, click animation, 2FA */
.glow-on-hover {
  width: 220px;
  height: 50px;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  color: #fff;
  background: #111;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.glow-on-hover:before {
  content: '';
  background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff0000, #ff7300, #fffb00, #48ff00, #00ffd5, #002bff, #7a00ff, #ff00c8, #ff0000);
  position: absolute;
  top: -2px;
  left: -2px;
  background-size: 400%;
  z-index: -1;
  filter: blur(5px);
  width: calc(100% + 4px);
  height: calc(100% + 4px);
  animation: glowing 20s linear infinite;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .3s ease-in-out;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.glow-on-hover:active {
  color: #000
}

.glow-on-hover:active:after {
  background: transparent;
}

.glow-on-hover:hover:before {
  opacity: 1;
}

.glow-on-hover:after {
  z-index: -1;
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background: #111;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

@keyframes glowing {
  0% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }

  50% {
    background-position: 400% 0;
  }

  100% {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}

</style>

Five staggered vertical bars that sequentially stroke-dash along their SVG paths while their stroke color shifts from cool blue through purple to hot pink, with each bar's color transition offset by 200ms to create a rolling rainbow wave.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <line class="bar bar1" x1="30" y1="50" x2="30" y2="250" stroke-width="8"/>
  <line class="bar bar2" x1="90" y1="50" x2="90" y2="250" stroke-width="8"/>
  <line class="bar bar3" x1="150" y1="50" x2="150" y2="250" stroke-width="8"/>
  <line class="bar bar4" x1="210" y1="50" x2="210" y2="250" stroke-width="8"/>
  <line class="bar bar5" x1="270" y1="50" x2="270" y2="250" stroke-width="8"/>
</svg>
<style>
.bar {
  stroke-dasharray: 200;
  stroke-dashoffset: 200;
  animation: dashWave 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  stroke-linecap: round;
}

.bar1 {
  animation-delay: 0ms;
}
.bar2 {
  animation-delay: 200ms;
}
.bar3 {
  animation-delay: 400ms;
}
.bar4 {
  animation-delay: 600ms;
}
.bar5 {
  animation-delay: 800ms;
}

@keyframes dashWave {
  0% {
    stroke: #0066cc;
    stroke-dashoffset: 200;
  }
  33% {
    stroke: #9933ff;
    stroke-dashoffset: 100;
  }
  66% {
    stroke: #ff0099;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
  100% {
    stroke: #0066cc;
    stroke-dashoffset: 200;
  }
}
</style>

A clipped circular mask that shrinks and expands concentrically while rotating, revealing and concealing layers of a background gradient that shifts position beneath it, synchronized so the clip-path timing creates a pulsing spotlight effect.

Three nested boxes that skew on the X-axis in opposite directions while their sizes grow and shrink inversely—the outer box expands as the inner shrinks—and their shadows cast at different angles to exaggerate the perspective distortion across four sequential phases.

Four concentric circles where the outermost skews on alternating axes while the inner circles counter-skew, their strokes dash-animate in opposite directions at different speeds, and each circle's size oscillates inversely—large strokes thin as inner circles expand—creating a twisting, breathing vortex with staggered timing between each ring.

A particle rain effect where drops translate downward at varying speeds while their opacity fades in and out, individual drops' border-radius shifts from sharp to fully rounded mid-fall, shadows stretch and compress vertically beneath them, and color transitions from cool cyan through warm amber, with each drop's timing offset to create a cascading, flickering waterfall of staggered motion phases.

A radial burst where six geometric petals scale outward from center while simultaneously rotating clockwise, each petal's stroke width pulsing (size), stroke color shifting through a gradient spectrum, and a central shadow expanding then contracting to create concentric rings of depth that accelerate then decelerate across the animation.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="shadow">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#6600ff" flood-opacity="0.7"/>
    </filter>
    <radialGradient id="centerGlow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff"/>
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#aa44ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="transparent"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  <g class="burst" transform="translate(150,150)">
    <ellipse class="petal p1" rx="14" ry="52" transform="rotate(0)"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p2" rx="14" ry="52" transform="rotate(60)"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p3" rx="14" ry="52" transform="rotate(120)"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p4" rx="14" ry="52" transform="rotate(180)"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p5" rx="14" ry="52" transform="rotate(240)"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p6" rx="14" ry="52" transform="rotate(300)"/>
    <circle class="ring r1" r="30" fill="none"/>
    <circle class="ring r2" r="55" fill="none"/>
    <circle class="ring r3" r="80" fill="none"/>
    <circle class="core" r="18" fill="url(#centerGlow)"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.burst {
  animation: burstRotate 4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) infinite;
}
@keyframes burstRotate {
  0%   { transform: translate(150px,150px) rotate(0deg) scale(0.5); }
  30%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) rotate(110deg) scale(1.15); }
  60%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) rotate(230deg) scale(0.9); }
  80%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) rotate(310deg) scale(1.05); }
  100% { transform: translate(150px,150px) rotate(360deg) scale(0.5); }
}
.petal {
  fill: none;
  animation: petalPulse 4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) infinite;
}
.p1 { animation-delay: 0s; }
.p2 { animation-delay: 0.12s; }
.p3 { animation-delay: 0.24s; }
.p4 { animation-delay: 0.36s; }
.p5 { animation-delay: 0.48s; }
.p6 { animation-delay: 0.60s; }
@keyframes petalPulse {
  0%   { stroke: #ff2266; stroke-width: 2; transform: scaleY(0.4); opacity:0.6; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 2px #ff2266); }
  15%  { stroke: #ff9900; stroke-width: 5; transform: scaleY(0.9); opacity:1;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px #ff9900); }
  30%  { stroke: #ffee00; stroke-width: 8; transform: scaleY(1.2); opacity:1;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 14px #ffee00); }
  50%  { stroke: #00ffcc; stroke-width: 6; transform: scaleY(1.05); opacity:1;  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px #00ffcc); }
  65%  { stroke: #3388ff; stroke-width: 9; transform: scaleY(1.3); opacity:1;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 16px #3388ff); }
  80%  { stroke: #cc44ff; stroke-width: 4; transform: scaleY(0.8); opacity:0.9; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px #cc44ff); }
  100% { stroke: #ff2266; stroke-width: 2; transform: scaleY(0.4); opacity:0.6; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 2px #ff2266); }
}
.ring {
  animation: ringPulse 4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) infinite;
}
.r1 { animation-delay: 0s; }
.r2 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
.r3 { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
@keyframes ringPulse {
  0%   { stroke: #ff2266; stroke-width: 1; opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(0.5); }
  25%  { stroke: #ffaa00; stroke-width: 3; opacity: 0.9; transform: scale(1.1); }
  50%  { stroke: #00ffcc; stroke-width: 5; opacity: 1;   transform: scale(1.4); }
  75%  { stroke: #6644ff; stroke-width: 2; opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(1.1); }
  100% { stroke: #ff2266; stroke-width: 1; opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(0.5); }
}
.core {
  animation: corePulse 4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) infinite;
}
@keyframes corePulse {
  0%   { r: 10; opacity: 0.5; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #fff); }
  30%  { r: 22; opacity: 1;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 20px #ffffff) drop-shadow(0 0 40px #aa44ff); }
  55%  { r: 16; opacity: 0.8; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px #cc88ff); }
  75%  { r: 26; opacity: 1;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 28px #ffffff) drop-shadow(0 0 56px #6600ff); }
  100% { r: 10; opacity: 0.5; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #fff); }
}
</style>

A text path where individual characters clip-reveal along a curved SVG trajectory while the background behind them shifts position diagonally, the clip region's border-radius morphs from sharp corners to fully rounded and back, and the shadow beneath the text grows darker then lighter in sync with the border-radius phases to enhance the dimensional reveal effect.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <path id="curve" d="M 20,200 Q 150,40 280,200"/>
    <clipPath id="revealClip">
      <rect class="clip-rect" x="0" y="0" width="300" height="300"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>
  <rect class="bg-shift" x="-60" y="-60" width="420" height="420"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#revealClip)">
    <g class="text-shadow-group">
      <text class="curved-text shadow-text">
        <textPath href="#curve" startOffset="0%">WAVE·MOTION·FLOW</textPath>
      </text>
    </g>
    <text class="curved-text main-text">
      <textPath href="#curve" startOffset="0%">WAVE·MOTION·FLOW</textPath>
    </text>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.bg-shift {
  fill: #0a0a2e;
  animation: bgDiag 5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes bgDiag {
  0%   { transform: translate(0px, 0px);   fill: #0a0a2e; }
  25%  { transform: translate(-20px,-15px); fill: #12103a; }
  50%  { transform: translate(-40px,-30px); fill: #1a0a3e; }
  75%  { transform: translate(-20px,-15px); fill: #12103a; }
  100% { transform: translate(0px, 0px);   fill: #0a0a2e; }
}
.clip-rect {
  animation: clipReveal 5s cubic-bezier(0.6,0,0.4,1) infinite;
  rx: 0;
  ry: 0;
}
@keyframes clipReveal {
  0%   { x: -300px; width: 300px; rx: 0;   ry: 0;   }
  20%  { x: -60px;  width: 300px; rx: 8px;  ry: 8px;  }
  40%  { x: 60px;   width: 300px; rx: 30px; ry: 30px; }
  60%  { x: 160px;  width: 300px; rx: 60px; ry: 60px; }
  75%  { x: 220px;  width: 300px; rx: 30px; ry: 30px; }
  88%  { x: 270px;  width: 300px; rx: 8px;  ry: 8px;  }
  100% { x: 300px;  width: 300px; rx: 0;   ry: 0;   }
}
.curved-text {
  font-family: 'Arial Black', sans-serif;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
}
.main-text {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #e0ccff;
  stroke-width: 0.5;
  paint-order: stroke fill;
  fill: #ffffff;
  animation: textColor 5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes textColor {
  0%   { fill: #ccaaff; stroke: #8844cc; }
  25%  { fill: #ffffff; stroke: #aa66ff; }
  50%  { fill: #ffe0ff; stroke: #ff88ff; }
  75%  { fill: #ffffff; stroke: #aa66ff; }
  100% { fill: #ccaaff; stroke: #8844cc; }
}
.shadow-text {
  fill: rgba(0,0,0,0);
  stroke: rgba(0,0,0,0);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.9));
  animation: shadowPulse 5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes shadowPulse {
  0%   { filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(80,0,120,0.3)); }
  25%  { filter: drop-shadow(0 5px 12px rgba(80,0,120,0.7)); }
  50%  { filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 22px rgba(120,0,180,1)) drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(180,100,255,0.6)); }
  75%  { filter: drop-shadow(0 5px 12px rgba(80,0,120,0.7)); }
  100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(80,0,120,0.3)); }
}
</style>

A liquid blob that morphs through four distinct shapes while its border-radius cycles from 20% to 60% to 40%, its stroke animates as a chasing dashed outline that reverses direction every half-cycle, stroke color transitions from teal to magenta, and an inner shadow inverts intensity in sync with each shape transition.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="innerShadow">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="3" />
      <feOffset dx="0" dy="2" result="offsetblur" />
      <feComponentTransfer>
        <feFuncA type="linear" slope="0.4" />
      </feComponentTransfer>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <g class="blob-container">
    <circle class="blob" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="#00d4d4" stroke-width="3" filter="url(#innerShadow)" />
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
svg {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
}

.blob {
  animation: blobMorph 4s ease-in-out infinite, blobStroke 4s ease-in-out infinite, blobColor 4s ease-in-out infinite, blobShadow 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes blobMorph {
  0% {
    border-radius: 20%;
    rx: 30%;
    ry: 20%;
  }
  25% {
    border-radius: 60%;
    rx: 60%;
    ry: 60%;
  }
  50% {
    border-radius: 40%;
    rx: 40%;
    ry: 50%;
  }
  75% {
    border-radius: 30%;
    rx: 25%;
    ry: 45%;
  }
  100% {
    border-radius: 20%;
    rx: 30%;
    ry: 20%;
  }
}

@keyframes blobStroke {
  0% {
    stroke-dasharray: 376;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
  25% {
    stroke-dasharray: 376;
    stroke-dashoffset: -188;
  }
  50% {
    stroke-dasharray: 376;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
  75% {
    stroke-dasharray: 376;
    stroke-dashoffset: -188;
  }
  100% {
    stroke-dasharray: 376;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
}

@keyframes blobColor {
  0% {
    stroke: #00d4d4;
  }
  50% {
    stroke: #ff00ff;
  }
  100% {
    stroke: #00d4d4;
  }
}

@keyframes blobShadow {
  0% {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0px rgba(0,212,212,0.8));
  }
  50% {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,0,255,0.4));
  }
  100% {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0px rgba(0,212,212,0.8));
  }
}
</style>

A bouncing ball that scales vertically while squashing (reducing height, increasing width) on impact, the impact zone clips a burst radius that shrinks and expands, the ball's shadow stretches horizontally beneath it during flight then compresses on landing, and a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses to accentuate each bounce in a six-phase sequence.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="ballGlow">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="2" />
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <g class="ball-scene">
    <ellipse class="ball-shadow" cx="150" cy="260" rx="40" ry="8" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.3)" />
    <circle class="ball-glow" cx="150" cy="100" r="50" fill="none" stroke="#ff6b9d" stroke-width="2" />
    <circle class="ball" cx="150" cy="100" r="20" fill="#ff6b9d" filter="url(#ballGlow)" />
    <circle class="burst-clip" cx="150" cy="100" r="30" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,107,157,0.4)" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
svg {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
}

.ball-scene {
  animation: ballBounce 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) infinite;
}

.ball {
  animation: ballSquash 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) infinite;
}

.ball-shadow {
  animation: shadowStretch 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) infinite;
}

.burst-clip {
  animation: burstPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.ball-glow {
  animation: glowPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes ballBounce {
  0%, 100% {
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
  50% {
    transform: translateY(-120px);
  }
}

@keyframes ballSquash {
  0%, 100% {
    transform: scaleY(1) scaleX(1);
  }
  50% {
    transform: scaleY(1) scaleX(1);
  }
  75% {
    transform: scaleY(0.7) scaleX(1.3);
  }
}

@keyframes shadowStretch {
  0%, 100% {
    rx: 40;
    ry: 8;
  }
  50% {
    rx: 25;
    ry: 12;
  }
  75% {
    rx: 50;
    ry: 6;
  }
}

@keyframes burstPulse {
  0%, 100% {
    r: 30;
    opacity: 0.2;
  }
  16.67% {
    r: 45;
    opacity: 0.4;
  }
  33.33% {
    r: 25;
    opacity: 0.3;
  }
  50% {
    r: 40;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
  66.67% {
    r: 20;
    opacity: 0.2;
  }
  83.33% {
    r: 35;
    opacity: 0.4;
  }
}

@keyframes glowPulse {
  0%, 100% {
    stroke-width: 2;
  }
  16.67% {
    stroke-width: 4;
  }
  33.33% {
    stroke-width: 2;
  }
  50% {
    stroke-width: 5;
  }
  66.67% {
    stroke-width: 2;
  }
  83.33% {
    stroke-width: 4;
  }
}
</style>

An origami fold sequence where two triangular flaps skew inward from opposite sides while their stroke-dasharray reveals crease lines that animate in staggered phases, the fold depth intensifies through color shifts from white to deep gray, and a shadow beneath the fold grows darker then lighter as the fold tightens then releases.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <g class="origami-fold">
    <polygon class="flap flap-left" points="150,150 80,80 80,220" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" />
    <polygon class="flap flap-right" points="150,150 220,80 220,220" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" />
    <line class="crease crease-left" x1="150" y1="150" x2="80" y2="150" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" />
    <line class="crease crease-right" x1="150" y1="150" x2="220" y2="150" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" />
    <ellipse class="fold-shadow" cx="150" cy="200" rx="60" ry="15" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.2)" />
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
svg {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
}

.flap-left {
  animation: flapLeftSkew 3s ease-in-out infinite, flapColor 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.flap-right {
  animation: flapRightSkew 3s ease-in-out infinite, flapColor 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.crease-left {
  animation: creaseLeftDash 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.1s;
}

.crease-right {
  animation: creaseRightDash 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.2s;
}

.fold-shadow {
  animation: shadowIntensity 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes flapLeftSkew {
  0%, 100% {
    transform: skewX(0deg);
  }
  50% {
    transform: skewX(25deg);
  }
}

@keyframes flapRightSkew {
  0%, 100% {
    transform: skewX(0deg);
  }
  50% {
    transform: skewX(-25deg);
  }
}

@keyframes flapColor {
  0%, 100% {
    stroke: #ffffff;
  }
  50% {
    stroke: #333333;
  }
}

@keyframes creaseLeftDash {
  0%, 100% {
    stroke-dasharray: 70;
    stroke-dashoffset: 70;
  }
  50% {
    stroke-dasharray: 70;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
}

@keyframes creaseRightDash {
  0%, 100% {
    stroke-dasharray: 70;
    stroke-dashoffset: 70;
  }
  50% {
    stroke-dasharray: 70;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
}

@keyframes shadowIntensity {
  0%, 100% {
    fill: rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  }
  50% {
    fill: rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
}
</style>

A segmented loading spinner with eight arcs where each arc's stroke-dasharray chases around its perimeter at staggered 80ms intervals, stroke color ripples through a gradient from indigo to cyan, the arc's stroke-width scales in response to rotation angle, and a central shadow pulses to indicate processing intensity.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="arcGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#4a00e0;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#00d4ff;stop-opacity:1" />

  <g class="spinner-container">
    <circle class="center-pulse" cx="150" cy="150" r="8" fill="rgba(74,0,224,0.3)" />
    <circle class="arc arc-0" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="url(#arcGrad)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <circle class="arc arc-1" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="url(#arcGrad)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <circle class="arc arc-2" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="url(#arcGrad)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <circle class="arc arc-3" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="url(#arcGrad)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <circle class="arc arc-4" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="url(#arcGrad)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <circle class="arc arc-5" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="url(#arcGrad)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <circle class="arc arc-6" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="url(#arcGrad)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <circle class="arc arc-7" cx="150" cy="150" r="60" fill="none" stroke="url(#arcGrad)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
svg {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
}

.spinner-container {
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.center-pulse {
  animation: centerPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.arc {
  stroke-dasharray: 94;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.arc-0 {
  animation: arcChase 2s linear infinite, arcWidth 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 0ms, 0ms;
}

.arc-1 {
  animation: arcChase 2s linear infinite 0.08s, arcWidth 2s ease-in-out infinite 0.08s;
}

.arc-2 {
  animation: arcChase 2s linear infinite 0.16s, arcWidth 2s ease-in-out infinite 0.16s;
}

.arc-3 {
  animation: arcChase 2s linear infinite 0.24s, arcWidth 2s ease-in-out infinite 0.24s;
}

.arc-4 {
  animation: arcChase 2s linear infinite 0.32s, arcWidth 2s ease-in-out infinite 0.32s;
}

.arc-5 {
  animation: arcChase 2s linear infinite 0.4s, arcWidth 2s ease-in-out infinite 0.4s;
}

.arc-6 {
  animation: arcChase 2s linear infinite 0.48s, arcWidth 2s ease-in-out infinite 0.48s;
}

.arc-7 {
  animation: arcChase 2s linear infinite 0.56s, arcWidth 2s ease-in-out infinite 0.56s;
}

@keyframes arcChase {
  0% {
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
    transform: rotate(0deg);
  }
  100% {
    stroke-dashoffset: -94;
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

@keyframes arcWidth {
  0%, 100% {
    stroke-width: 4;
  }
  25% {
    stroke-width: 6;
  }
  50% {
    stroke-width: 3;
  }

  }

@keyframes centerPulse {

    fill: rgba(0,212,255,0.5);
  }

Interlocking gears where the primary gear rotates clockwise while three secondary gears counter-rotate, each gear's stroke-width modulates inversely with rotation speed, stroke color cycles through complementary pairs, and skewed perspective shadows beneath each gear shift angle to exaggerate the mechanical interlocking motion across four staggered startup phases.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" style="width: 300px; height: 300px;">
  <defs>
    <filter id="gearshadow">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceAlpha" stdDeviation="2"/>
      <feOffset dx="2" dy="3"/>
      <feComponentTransfer>
        <feFuncA type="linear" slope="0.3"/>
      </feComponentTransfer>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <g filter="url(#gearshadow)">
    <g class="gear gear-primary" transform="translate(150, 150)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="35" fill="none" stroke="#ff6b6b" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      <g class="gear-teeth">
        <rect x="-4" y="-45" width="8" height="15" fill="#ff6b6b"/>
        <rect x="-4" y="30" width="8" height="15" fill="#ff6b6b"/>
        <rect x="-45" y="-4" width="15" height="8" fill="#ff6b6b"/>
        <rect x="30" y="-4" width="15" height="8" fill="#ff6b6b"/>
        <rect x="-32" y="-32" width="8" height="12" fill="#ff6b6b" transform="rotate(45 -28 -26)"/>
        <rect x="24" y="-32" width="8" height="12" fill="#ff6b6b" transform="rotate(-45 28 -26)"/>
        <rect x="-32" y="24" width="8" height="12" fill="#ff6b6b" transform="rotate(-45 -28 30)"/>
        <rect x="24" y="24" width="8" height="12" fill="#ff6b6b" transform="rotate(45 28 30)"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    
    <g class="gear gear-secondary-1" transform="translate(220, 150)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#4ecdc4" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      <g class="gear-teeth-small">
        <rect x="-3" y="-28" width="6" height="10" fill="#4ecdc4"/>
        <rect x="-3" y="18" width="6" height="10" fill="#4ecdc4"/>
        <rect x="-28" y="-3" width="10" height="6" fill="#4ecdc4"/>
        <rect x="18" y="-3" width="10" height="6" fill="#4ecdc4"/>
      </g>
    </g>

    <g class="gear gear-secondary-2" transform="translate(120, 220)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#45b7d1" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      <g class="gear-teeth-small">
        <rect x="-3" y="-28" width="6" height="10" fill="#45b7d1"/>
        <rect x="-3" y="18" width="6" height="10" fill="#45b7d1"/>
        <rect x="-28" y="-3" width="10" height="6" fill="#45b7d1"/>
        <rect x="18" y="-3" width="10" height="6" fill="#45b7d1"/>
      </g>
    </g>

    <g class="gear gear-secondary-3" transform="translate(80, 150)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#f7b731" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      <g class="gear-teeth-small">
        <rect x="-3" y="-28" width="6" height="10" fill="#f7b731"/>
        <rect x="-3" y="18" width="6" height="10" fill="#f7b731"/>
        <rect x="-28" y="-3" width="10" height="6" fill="#f7b731"/>
        <rect x="18" y="-3" width="10" height="6" fill="#f7b731"/>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
.gear-primary {
  animation: rotatePrimary 4s linear infinite;
}

.gear-primary circle,
.gear-primary .gear-teeth rect {
  animation: strokeColorPrimary 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-fill-mode: both;
}

.gear-secondary-1 {
  animation: rotateSecondary 3s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: 0.2s;
}

.gear-secondary-1 circle,
.gear-secondary-1 .gear-teeth-small rect {
  animation: strokeColorSecondary1 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 0.2s;
  animation-fill-mode: both;

.gear-secondary-2 {

  animation-delay: 0.4s;
}

.gear-secondary-2 circle,

.gear-secondary-2 {

@keyframes strokeColorPrimary {

@keyframes strokeColorSecondary1 {
  0% {
    stroke: #4ecdc4;

A radiant sun where central rays rotate while their stroke-width scales rhythmically, the rays' stroke color transitions from yellow through orange to red in a three-phase heating sequence, a surrounding halo's border-radius morphs from sharp to completely rounded and back, and the outer glow's shadow intensifies as the animation peaks, all with staggered timing for each ray group.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="glow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="coloredBlur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <g class="sun-group">
    <circle class="core" cx="150" cy="150" r="20"/>
    <g class="rays rays1">
      <line class="ray" x1="150" y1="50" x2="150" y2="10" stroke-width="6"/>
      <line class="ray" x1="150" y1="50" x2="150" y2="10" stroke-width="6" transform="rotate(60 150 150)"/>
      <line class="ray" x1="150" y1="50" x2="150" y2="10" stroke-width="6" transform="rotate(120 150 150)"/>
    </g>
    <g class="rays rays2">
      <line class="ray" x1="150" y1="50" x2="150" y2="10" stroke-width="6" transform="rotate(180 150 150)"/>
      <line class="ray" x1="150" y1="50" x2="150" y2="10" stroke-width="6" transform="rotate(240 150 150)"/>
      <line class="ray" x1="150" y1="50" x2="150" y2="10" stroke-width="6" transform="rotate(300 150 150)"/>
    </g>
    <circle class="halo" cx="150" cy="150" r="80" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,0,0.3)" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle class="glow" cx="150" cy="150" r="100" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,150,0,0.2)" stroke-width="4" filter="url(#glow)"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.sun-group {
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.core {
  fill: #ffff00;
  animation: core-pulse 4s infinite ease-in-out;
}

.rays1 {
  animation: rays-rotate 3s linear infinite;
}

.rays2 {
  animation: rays-rotate 3s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: 0.3s;
}

.ray {
  stroke: #ffaa00;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  animation: ray-color 6s infinite ease-in-out, ray-width 6s infinite ease-in-out;
}

.rays2 .ray {
  animation-delay: 2s, 2s;
}

.halo {
  animation: halo-morph 4s infinite ease-in-out;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,100,0,0.6));
}

.glow {
  animation: glow-pulse 4s infinite ease-in-out;
}

@keyframes core-pulse {
  0%, 100% { r: 20; opacity: 1; }
  50% { r: 25; opacity: 0.8; }
}

@keyframes rays-rotate {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

@keyframes ray-color {
  0% { stroke: #ffff00; }
  33% { stroke: #ffaa00; }
  66% { stroke: #ff3300; }
  100% { stroke: #ffff00; }
}

@keyframes ray-width {
  0%, 100% { stroke-width: 6; }
  50% { stroke-width: 10; }
}

@keyframes halo-morph {
  0%, 100% { 
    border-radius: 0%;
    stroke-width: 3;
  }
  50% { 
    border-radius: 50%;
    stroke-width: 6;
  }
}

@keyframes glow-pulse {
  0%, 100% { 
    r: 100;
    stroke: rgba(255,150,0,0.2);
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255,100,0,0.3));
  }
  50% { 
    r: 120;
    stroke: rgba(255,100,0,0.5);
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 16px rgba(255,50,0,0.8));
  }
}
</style>

A water droplet that falls and bounces, its clip-path shifts from teardrop to sphere on impact, the droplet's stroke animates as a surface tension line that moves across its surface, stroke color fades from saturated blue to pale, the shadow beneath stretches horizontally on landing then snaps back, and the background-position shifts upward to simulate water reflection parallax.

A kaleidoscope pattern where twelve triangular wedges rotate clockwise while skewing on alternating axes, each wedge's stroke-width pulsates to the beat, stroke color sequences through a rainbow gradient in staggered phases (offset by 30ms per wedge), the center clips a rotating mask with morphing border-radius, and layered shadows cast at varying opacity to create depth.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">

      <polygon class="wedge wedge6" points="150,150 150,50 190,90" fill="url(#kaleidoGrad)" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" transform="rotate(150 150 150)"/>
      <polygon class="wedge wedge7" points="150,150 150,50 190,90" fill="url(#kaleidoGrad)" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" transform="rotate(180 150 150)"/>
      <polygon class="wedge wedge8" points="150,150 150,50 190,90" fill="url(#kaleidoGrad)" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" transform="rotate(210 150 150)"/>
      <polygon class="wedge wedge9" points="150,150 150,50 190,90" fill="url(#kaleidoGrad)" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" transform="rotate(240 150 150)"/>

A pulsating membrane that cycles border-radius from 10% (sharp) to 50% (bulbous) while its stroke-dasharray animates as a chasing wave, the wave acceleration creates a four-phase rhythm (slow-fast-slow-medium), stroke color shifts from pale to vibrant and back, and the membrane's shadow inverts (cast outward then inward) to suggest expansion and contraction.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>

        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>

</svg>
<style>

  fill: none;

  stroke-dasharray: 502;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  border-radius: 10%;
  animation: pulse-border 6s ease-in-out infinite, dash-wave 3.5s ease-in-out infinite, stroke-shift 4s ease-in-out infinite, shadow-invert 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(100, 100, 150, 0.4));
}

@keyframes pulse-border {
  0% { border-radius: 10%; }
  25% { border-radius: 25%; }
  50% { border-radius: 50%; }
  75% { border-radius: 30%; }
  100% { border-radius: 10%; }

@keyframes dash-wave {
  0% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; animation-timing-function: ease-out; }
  25% { stroke-dashoffset: -100; animation-timing-function: ease-in; }
  50% { stroke-dashoffset: -250; animation-timing-function: ease-out; }
  75% { stroke-dashoffset: -380; animation-timing-function: ease-in-out; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -502; }
}

@keyframes stroke-shift {
  0% { stroke: #c0d9ff; }
  50% { stroke: #1f4fff; }
  100% { stroke: #c0d9ff; }
}

@keyframes shadow-invert {
  0% { filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(100, 100, 150, 0.4)); }
  50% { filter: drop-shadow(0 -4px 8px rgba(100, 100, 150, 0.4)); }
  100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(100, 100, 150, 0.4)); }
}
</style>

A folding envelope where the top flap skews downward while its stroke-dasharray animates to trace a crease line, the flap's stroke color shifts from white to gray as it closes, the back panel's shadow grows darker beneath the flap, the envelope's border-radius subtly rounds corners on open then sharpens on close, and the background-position shifts to simulate paper texture translation.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">

@keyframes shadow-grow {

  100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)); }

@keyframes bg-shift {
  0% { background-position: 0 0; }

}
</style>

A rotating aperture where concentric rings scale outward while counter-rotating, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposite directions, stroke color sequences through complementary gradients in staggered phases, inner shadows alternate between sharp and diffuse, and the central clip-path shrinks then expands to create a pulsing iris effect across six nested ring layers.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="apertureGrad1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ff3366;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffaa00;stop-opacity:1" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="apertureGrad2" x1="100%" y1="100%" x2="0%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#00ccff;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ff3366;stop-opacity:1" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <g class="aperture">
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="90" class="ring r1" stroke="url(#apertureGrad1)"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="75" class="ring r2" stroke="url(#apertureGrad2)"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="60" class="ring r3" stroke="url(#apertureGrad1)"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="45" class="ring r4" stroke="url(#apertureGrad2)"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="30" class="ring r5" stroke="url(#apertureGrad1)"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="15" class="ring r6" stroke="url(#apertureGrad2)"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.aperture { transform-origin: 150px 150px; }

.ring {
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 3;
  stroke-dasharray: 283;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3));
  animation: ring-scale 4s ease-in-out infinite, ring-dash 4s ease-in-out infinite, iris-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.r1 { animation-delay: 0s, 0s, 0s; }
.r2 { animation-delay: 0.15s, -0.2s, 0.3s; }
.r3 { animation-delay: 0.3s, -0.4s, 0.6s; }
.r4 { animation-delay: 0.45s, -0.6s, 0.9s; }
.r5 { animation-delay: 0.6s, -0.8s, 1.2s; }
.r6 { animation-delay: 0.75s, -1s, 1.5s; }

@keyframes ring-scale {
  0% { r: 90; }
  50% { r: 105; }
  100% { r: 90; }
}

.r2 { animation: ring-scale-alt 4s ease-in-out infinite, ring-dash 4s ease-in-out infinite, iris-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
.r4 { animation: ring-scale-alt 4s ease-in-out infinite, ring-dash 4s ease-in-out infinite, iris-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
.r6 { animation: ring-scale-alt 4s ease-in-out infinite, ring-dash 4s ease-in-out infinite, iris-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

@keyframes ring-scale-alt {
  0% { r: 75; }
  50% { r: 60; }
  100% { r: 75; }
}

@keyframes ring-dash {
  0% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  50% { stroke-dashoffset: -283; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
}

@keyframes iris-pulse {
  0% { filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)); }
  50% { filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)); }
  100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)); }
}
</style>

A cascading ribbon that translates diagonally downward while its stroke-width modulates to create a rippling wave, the wave accelerates then decelerates across four phases, stroke-dasharray chases the ribbon length, stroke color fades from opaque magenta to transparent, the ribbon's shadow stretches perpendicular to motion, and skew distortion warps the ribbon's perspective at peak velocity.

  }

A throb effect where a central shape scales up and down while its border-radius morphs from sharp to completely rounded and back in sync with scale expansion, the shape's stroke-width pulses inversely to scale (thin on expand, thick on contract), stroke color brightens on expansion then darkens on contraction, and the outer glow's shadow grows and shrinks to emphasize the breathing rhythm.

A morphing blob swarm where eight blobs cluster then scatter while each blob's border-radius cycles independently, the cluster's combined stroke-width creates a boundary that animates as the group shape changes, stroke color ripples through a gradient as blobs reposition, shadows beneath blobs darken when clustered then lighten when scattered, and staggered timing creates a wave-like separation effect.

<style>

  transform-origin: 150px 150px;

  stroke-linecap: round;

.blob3 {
  animation: blobSwarm3 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 0.5s;
}

.blob4 {

  animation-delay: 0.75s;

.blob5 {

}

.blob6 {
  animation: blobSwarm6 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 1.25s;
}

.blob7 {
  animation: blobSwarm7 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 1.5s;
}

Stacked cards that fan outward from center while each card's border-radius rounds progressively as it rotates, the top card scales up slightly during the spread, shadows cast at increasing angles beneath each card, and a background-position shift creates a subtle depth parallax as cards separate.

A wave of falling dominoes where each block translates downward in staggered sequence while skewing forward on impact, the block's border-radius subtly rounds on collision, the stroke-width fattens at contact point, and the shadow beneath stretches horizontally then snaps back, creating a cascading topple effect.

A swinging pendulum bob that rotates on an arc while its border-radius cycles from sharp at the swing extremes to completely rounded at the center point, creating a breathing effect; the bob's stroke animates as a fading trail, the shadow beneath stretches perpendicular to motion, and the swing's scale compresses slightly at peak velocity.

A geometric spiral expanding outward while rotating clockwise, its stroke-dasharray accelerates then decelerates in a breathing rhythm, stroke color gradually shifts from cool blue to warm orange across three seconds, the spiral's border-radius at curve intersections morphs from sharp to rounded, and a concentric shadow radiates and contracts to create depth.

<svg class="spiral-container" viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <g class="spiral-group">
    <path class="spiral-path" d="M150,150 Q150,100 100,100 Q50,100 50,150 Q50,200 100,200 Q150,200 150,150 Q150,120 120,120 Q90,120 90,150"/>

<style>
.spiral-container {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: block;
}

.spiral-group {
  animation: spiralRotate 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.spiral-path {
  stroke: #4a90e2;
  stroke-width: 3;
  fill: none;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-dasharray: 400;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  animation: colorShift 3s ease-in-out infinite, dashBreathe 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.spiral-shadow {
  fill: #4a90e2;
  animation: shadowRadiate 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes spiralRotate {
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(0.8); }
  50% { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.1); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(0.8); }
}

@keyframes colorShift {
  0% { stroke: #4a90e2; }
  50% { stroke: #ff8a65; }
  100% { stroke: #4a90e2; }
}

@keyframes dashBreathe {
  0%, 100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  50% { stroke-dashoffset: 200; }
}

@keyframes shadowRadiate {
  0%, 100% { rx: 60; ry: 60; opacity: 0.08; }
  50% { rx: 100; ry: 100; opacity: 0.2; }
}
</style>

Six geometric petals that scale outward from center while rotating clockwise, each petal's stroke animates with a dashing wave that ripples outward in staggered 100ms offsets, stroke color sequences through a rainbow gradient, and the petal's border-radius morphs from sharp angular points to soft rounded lobes as scale increases, with a central expanding shadow creating concentric rings.

A liquid blob morphing through four distinct shapes while its border-radius cycles between 30% (angular) and 60% (bulbous), its outline stroke-dasharray chases in reverse direction every half-cycle, stroke color transitions from teal to magenta, and an inner shadow alternates between sharp and soft to suggest surface tension shifts and dimensional morphing.

A bouncing basketball that scales vertically while squashing horizontally on impact, the impact zone clips a burst-pattern that expands then contracts, the ball's shadow stretches during flight and compresses on landing, and a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses to accentuate each bounce across six phases with staggered timing for secondary bounces.

An origami fold where two triangular flaps skew inward from opposite sides while their stroke-dasharray reveals crease lines in staggered animation phases, the fold depth intensifies through color shifts from white to deep gray, the folds' stroke-width increases as they close, and a shadow beneath grows darker as the fold tightens, suggesting compressed three-dimensional paper layering.

A segmented loading spinner with eight arcs where each arc's stroke-dasharray chases around its perimeter at staggered 80ms intervals, stroke color ripples through indigo-to-cyan gradient with each arc offset by 50ms, the arc's stroke-width scales responsively to rotation angle, and a central shadow pulses to indicate processing intensity in four rapid phases.

A paper airplane that translates upward along a curved arc while rotating on three axes, its fuselage stroke-dasharray animates as if wind-peeling the outline backwards, the plane's clip-path narrows and widens to simulate banking turns, the shadow beneath stretches at sharp angles during turns then compresses in straight flight, and the background-position shifts to create wind-swept depth.

Three interlocking gears where the primary gear rotates clockwise while two secondary gears counter-rotate, each gear's stroke-width modulates inversely with rotation speed, stroke color cycles through complementary gold-and-purple pairs, and skewed perspective shadows shift angle beneath each gear to exaggerate mechanical interlocking across four staggered startup acceleration phases.

A water droplet that falls and bounces where the clip-path shifts from elongated teardrop to perfect sphere on impact, the droplet's stroke animates as a surface tension line traversing its surface in staggered waves, stroke color fades from saturated blue to pale transparency, the shadow beneath stretches horizontally on landing then snaps back, and background-position shifts upward to simulate reflected water ripples beneath.

A pulsating biological membrane that cycles border-radius from angular (10%) to bulbous (50%) while its stroke-dasharray animates as a chasing wave accelerating through four phases (slow-fast-slow-medium), stroke color shifts from pale pastel to vibrant neon and back, and the membrane's shadow inverts from cast-outward to cast-inward creating visual expansion and contraction tension.

A geometric tessellation where six hexagons translate inward toward center in staggered 150ms sequence, each hexagon's stroke-width scales as it approaches center (fattening on arrival), stroke color builds from muted gray to saturated color as shapes converge, border-radius subtly morphs to create slight bulging effects, and overlapping shadows darken to suggest layering compression depth.

A folding envelope where the top flap skews downward while its stroke-dasharray animates to trace crease lines in three phases, the flap's stroke color shifts from white to gray as it closes, the back panel's shadow grows darker beneath the closing flap, the envelope's border-radius subtly rounds corners when open then sharpens when closed, and background-position shifts subtly to simulate paper texture translation.

A starfield warp where concentric circular clips expand and contract in rippling waves while rotating, each clip-path ring reveals layered background gradients shifting position beneath, the outermost clip's border-radius morphs from sharp to rounded and back in sync with expansion phases, and shadows radiate concentrically to create depth tunnel effect.

An origami crease-fold where two triangular flaps skew inward from opposite sides while their stroke-dasharray animates to reveal sharp crease lines in staggered phases, the fold's color shifts from bright white to deep charcoal, stroke-width increases as flaps compress, and the shadow beneath darkens progressively suggesting layered three-dimensional paper density.

A metaball blob cluster that morphs through four distinct bulbous shapes while its stroke animates as a chasing dashed outline reversing direction every half-cycle, border-radius cycles from 35% angular to 65% fully-round, stroke-color transitions through teal-magenta-cyan spectrum, and an inner shadow inverts intensity at each shape transition suggesting dimensional surface tension.

A comet streaking diagonally across the screen while its trailing tail's stroke-dasharray animates backward at a 150ms lag behind the head's movement, the tail's stroke-width fattens then thins across three acceleration phases, the comet head's shadow stretches and compresses perpendicular to motion, and tail color fades from white through amber to transparency.

A lightning arc that strikes downward while its stroke-dasharray animates as a crackling pulse traveling along the arc path, the bolt's stroke-width modulates to suggest electrical intensity peaks, stroke-color flashes from white to purple to blue in rapid staggered bursts, the shadow beside the bolt grows and shrinks, and clip-path masking reveals the arc in jagged reveal-and-conceal patterns.

.front-face {

}

.right-face {

  25% {

  }

  }
  100% {

  }
}

@keyframes backFaceScale {

    stroke-width: 2;
  }

    transform: scale(0.85);
    stroke-width: 1.5;
  }
  50% {

    stroke-width: 1;
  }

    transform: scale(0.85);
    stroke-width: 1.5;
  }
  100% {

    stroke-width: 2;
  }

@keyframes frontFaceScale {

    transform: scale(1);
    stroke-width: 2;

    transform: scale(1.15);
    stroke-width: 2.5;
  }
  50% {

    stroke-width: 3;
  }
  75% {

    stroke-width: 2.5;
  }

    stroke-width: 2;
  }
}

A shearing grid of nine rectangular cells where each cell skews independently on staggered 80ms offsets, border-radius on each cell rounds progressively from sharp to slightly curved, the grid's combined stroke-dasharray creates a boundary wave pattern, and cell shadows deepen then lighten in cascading sequence.

A diamond that shears between sharp acute and obtuse angles via X-axis skew while its border-radius cycles from 0% to 15%, creating a subtle bulging effect, the stroke animates as a pulsing outline that brightens then dims, and the shadow inverts direction (cast left then right) to suggest rotational depth.

A kaleidoscopic pattern where six wedges rotate clockwise while each wedge skews inward toward center in staggered 90ms offsets, each wedge's stroke-width pulsates to the rotation beat, stroke-color sequences through rainbow spectrum offset by 40ms per wedge, and the center clips a rotating mask with morphing border-radius.

A shearing asterisk where six thin bars rotate while skewing on alternating axes, each bar's stroke-width scales inversely with skew intensity (thin when sheared, thick when straight), stroke-color flashes through a six-phase hue rotation, and shadows beneath each bar shift angle based on its skew orientation.

A concave-convex morphing shape that cycles between sharp-angled (0% border-radius) and fully rounded (50% border-radius) while skewing subtly on the X-axis to exaggerate the bulge, the stroke-dasharray animates as a chasing wave that accelerates on expansion then decelerates on contraction, and the shadow inverts (cast outward then inward) to suggest dimensional pressure.

A sheared grid pattern where twelve diamond cells rotate slowly while each cell skews independently in staggered 75ms offsets, border-radius on cell corners morphs from sharp to subtly rounded, stroke-width on each cell pulses to the rotation beat, and the background-position scrolls diagonally beneath creating parallax depth.

A morphing bowtie shape that skews to impossibly thin proportions then expands back while rotating, its border-radius on the center knot rounds progressively from sharp to fully curved as skew increases, the stroke animates as a color gradient shifting warm-to-cool, and shadows cast at opposite angles beneath each wing exaggerate the perspective pinch.

A hinged envelope flap that skews downward while its leading edge's border-radius rounds from sharp to fully curved as the flap closes, the flap's stroke-color shifts from white to deep gray, stroke-width increases with compression, and the shadow beneath darkens progressively suggesting compressed three-dimensional paper layering.

Four concentric rings that rotate at different speeds while each ring skews on alternating axes, the outermost ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposite directions to the innermost, stroke-color sequences through gradient pairs offset by 200ms per ring, and inner shadows alternate between sharp and diffuse creating a twisting breathing vortex.

A double helix where two intertwined curves skew and counter-skew on alternating axes while rotating 360 degrees, each strand's stroke-width oscillates inversely creating a braiding effect, stroke-color gradients flow through complementary spectrum offsets, and shadows cast at opposing angles amplify the helical three-dimensional coiling depth.

<style>

A glitch datamosh effect where three rectangular layers translate horizontally at staggered speeds while their clip-path apertures shrink and expand out of sync, each layer's stroke-dasharray animates as a horizontal scan line, and stroke-color flashes through red-green-blue channels in rapid bursts to simulate chromatic aberration with a central shadow that splinters and reforms.

A liquid blob that morphs through four distinct amorphous shapes while its border-radius cycles from 25% angular to 65% fully-bulbous, the blob's fill-color transitions through teal-magenta-cyan, a surrounding stroke-dasharray chases the boundary in reverse direction every half-cycle, and an inner shadow inverts from cast-inward to cast-outward suggesting surface tension shifts.

A starfield warp where six concentric circular clips expand and contract in rippling waves while rotating, each clip-path layer reveals layered background gradients shifting position diagonally beneath in parallax, the outermost clip's border-radius morphs from sharp to rounded and back, and a radial shadow expands then contracts concentrically to create depth tunnel effect.

A morphing gear set where the primary gear rotates clockwise while two secondary gears counter-rotate at staggered speeds, each gear's stroke-width modulates inversely with rotation speed to suggest mechanical tension, stroke-color cycles through gold-purple complementary pairs, and skewed perspective shadows shift angle beneath each gear to exaggerate three-dimensional interlocking engagement.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">

A DNA double helix where two intertwined curves rotate 360 degrees while skewing and counter-skewing on alternating axes at staggered 100ms intervals, each strand's stroke-width oscillates inversely (one fattens as the other thins), stroke-dasharray chases in opposite directions at different speeds, color gradients flow through complementary blue-to-orange spectrum offsets, and shadows cast at opposing angles amplify the helical three-dimensional coiling depth.

A kaleidoscope pattern where twelve triangular wedges rotate clockwise while skewing on alternating axes in a 360-degree spin, each wedge's stroke-width pulsates to a four-beat rhythm matching the rotation, stroke-color sequences through rainbow gradient with each wedge offset by 30ms, the center clips a rotating mask with morphing border-radius from 0% sharp to 50% rounded, and layered shadows cast at varying opacity (25%, 50%, 75%) suggest radial depth recession.

A bouncing basketball where the ball scales vertically while squashing horizontally on impact (height decreases, width increases), the impact zone clips a radial burst-pattern that expands then contracts, the ball's shadow stretches during flight and compresses on landing in rapid three-phase sequence, a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses to accentuate each bounce, and opacity of secondary bounces fades in staggered rhythm creating diminishing bounce effect.

Matrix-style falling glyphs translating downward in staggered columns (each column offset by 120ms), each glyph's stroke animates as a glowing outline that brightens then dims in three-cycle phases, glyph fill-color shifts from bright neon-green through faded gray-green suggesting digital decay, the glyph's border-radius subtly morphs from sharp to slightly rounded (5% to 15%) as opacity decreases, and background-position scrolls vertically creating cascading depth parallax beneath the glyphs.

A geometric tessellation where six hexagons translate inward toward center in staggered 150ms sequence, each hexagon's stroke-width scales as it approaches center (fattening on arrival to 3x original width), stroke-color builds from muted gray-blue to saturated vibrant-blue as shapes converge, border-radius subtly morphs from sharp (0%) to slightly rounded (10%) creating subtle bulging effect, and overlapping shadows darken progressively to suggest layering compression depth.

A bouncing ball where it scales vertically while squashing horizontally on impact, the impact zone clips a radial burst-pattern expanding then contracting in rapid sequence, the ball's shadow stretches during flight and compresses on landing, a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses to accentuate each bounce in a six-phase sequence, and opacity of secondary bounces fades in staggered rhythm creating diminishing bounce effect with trailing shadow distortion.

A liquid blob swarm where eight blobs cluster together then scatter, each blob's border-radius cycles independently from angular (20%) to fully rounded (60%), the cluster's combined stroke-width animates as a boundary that expands then contracts in response to group shape changes, stroke-color ripples through gradient wave as blobs reposition in staggered 120ms offsets, and shadows beneath blobs darken when clustered then lighten when scattered.
