</style>

A spinning aperture iris where four concentric rings rotate in opposite alternating directions while counter-scaling, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposite directions at staggered speeds creating visual tension, stroke-color sequences through cyan-magenta-yellow gradient pairs offset by 80ms, inner shadows alternate between sharp and soft focus in sync with border-radius morphing, and the central clip-path creates pulsing aperture opening-closing effect.

A ferris wheel rotation where six cabin boxes rotate around a center axis while each cabin's border-radius morphs from sharp (0%) to softly rounded (15%) at the top of the arc, each cabin's stroke-dasharray chases in sequence at staggered intervals, stroke-width modulates to suggest dimensional perspective near and far from viewer, and overlapping shadows shift angle based on cabin rotation position.

An expanding sunburst where six geometric rays rotate outward from center while their stroke-width scales rhythmically in sync with rotation, stroke-color transitions through yellow-orange-deep-red in a three-phase heating sequence with staggered offsets, a surrounding halo's border-radius morphs from sharp to completely rounded, and the outer glow's shadow intensifies at peak animation.

A swinging pendulum where the bob translates in an arc while rotating, its clip-path narrows and widens to simulate perspective banking, the string's stroke-dasharray animates as a subtle tension wave, and the shadow beneath the bob stretches and compresses with each swing cycle.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="shadow-blur">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/>
      <feFlood flood-color="rgba(0,0,0,0.4)" result="color"/>
      <feComposite in="color" in2="blur" operator="in" result="shadow"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="shadow"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Pivot point -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="30" r="5" fill="#555"/>

  <!-- Shadow beneath bob -->
  <ellipse class="bob-shadow" cx="150" cy="270" rx="18" ry="6" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.25)"/>

  <!-- String -->
  <line class="string" x1="150" y1="30" x2="150" y2="200" stroke="#888" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Bob -->
  <g class="pendulum-group">
    <ellipse class="bob" cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="22" fill="url(#bobGrad)" filter="url(#shadow-blur)"/>
  </g>

  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="bobGrad" cx="40%" cy="35%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8c96a"/>
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#c8832a"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7a3a0a"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="bob-clip">
      <ellipse id="clip-ellipse" cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="22"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>
</svg>

<style>
.pendulum-group {
  transform-origin: 150px 30px;
  transform: rotate(-40deg);
  animation: swing 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-box: fill-box;
}

/* Override transform-box for SVG group positioned correctly */
svg .pendulum-group {
  transform-box: view-box;
  transform-origin: 150px 30px;
}

.bob {
  transform: translateX(150px) translateY(215px);
  animation: bob-perspective 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.string {
  stroke-dasharray: 8 4;
  animation: string-tension 2.4s ease-in-out infinite, string-move 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 30px;
  transform-box: view-box;
}

.bob-shadow {
  animation: shadow-stretch 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes swing {
  0%   { transform: rotate(-40deg); }
  25%  { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(40deg); }
  75%  { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(-40deg); }
}

@keyframes bob-perspective {
  0%   { rx: 14px; ry: 22px; }
  25%  { rx: 22px; ry: 22px; }
  50%  { rx: 14px; ry: 22px; }
  75%  { rx: 22px; ry: 22px; }
  100% { rx: 14px; ry: 22px; }
}

@keyframes string-tension {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 4 8; stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  20%  { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; stroke-dashoffset: -5; }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 4 8; stroke-dashoffset: -10; }
  80%  { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; stroke-dashoffset: -5; }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 4 8; stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
}

@keyframes string-move {
  0%   { transform: rotate(-40deg); }
  25%  { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(40deg); }
  75%  { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(-40deg); }
}

@keyframes shadow-stretch {
  0%   { rx: 10px; ry: 4px; cx: 90px;  opacity: 0.5; }
  25%  { rx: 18px; ry: 6px; cx: 150px; opacity: 0.7; }
  50%  { rx: 10px; ry: 4px; cx: 210px; opacity: 0.5; }
  75%  { rx: 18px; ry: 6px; cx: 150px; opacity: 0.7; }
  100% { rx: 10px; ry: 4px; cx: 90px;  opacity: 0.5; }
}
</style>

A lightning strike where the jagged path's clip-path creates sharp angular reveals while skewing between extreme left-right angles, the stroke-dasharray pulses as a glowing crackling wave, stroke-color flashes white-purple-blue in 50ms rapid offsets, and the shadow stretches perpendicular to create menacing depth.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="lightning-glow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="5" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <filter id="lightning-shadow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="8"/>
      <feFlood flood-color="rgba(80,0,160,0.7)" result="color"/>
      <feComposite in="color" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="300" height="300" fill="#050510"/>

  <!-- Shadow / depth -->
  <path class="lightning-shadow" d="M150,20 L128,85 L162,90 L120,170 L158,168 L100,280 L155,200 L122,195 L165,115 L132,110 L160,20 Z"
        fill="rgba(100,0,200,0.4)" filter="url(#lightning-shadow)"/>

  <!-- Main lightning bolt -->
  <path class="lightning" d="M150,20 L128,85 L162,90 L120,170 L158,168 L100,280 L155,200 L122,195 L165,115 L132,110 L160,20 Z"
        fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"
        filter="url(#lightning-glow)"/>

  <!-- Branch 1 -->
  <path class="branch b1" d="M135,95 L110,130 L125,128" fill="none" stroke="#cc99ff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <!-- Branch 2 -->
  <path class="branch b2" d="M155,165 L185,190 L170,185" fill="none" stroke="#cc99ff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
</svg>

<style>
.lightning {
  stroke-dasharray: 20 8 4 8;
  animation:
    lightning-flash 0.25s steps(1) infinite,
    lightning-skew 0.25s ease-in-out infinite,
    lightning-dash 0.4s linear infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  transform-box: view-box;
  clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%);
}

.lightning-shadow {
  animation:
    shadow-stretch 0.25s ease-in-out infinite,
    lightning-skew 0.25s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  transform-box: view-box;
}

.branch {
  stroke-dasharray: 30 100;
  stroke-dashoffset: 100;
  animation: branch-appear 0.25s steps(1) infinite;
}

.b1 { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
.b2 { animation-delay: 0.12s; }

@keyframes lightning-flash {
  0%   { stroke: #ffffff; fill: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); stroke-width: 4px; clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 80% 100%, 20% 100%); }
  8%   { stroke: #cc88ff; fill: rgba(160,50,255,0.15); stroke-width: 3px; clip-path: polygon(5% 0%, 95% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); }
  16%  { stroke: #ffffff; fill: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); stroke-width: 5px; clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 85% 100%, 15% 100%); }
  24%  { stroke: #88aaff; fill: rgba(80,100,255,0.1);  stroke-width: 2px; clip-path: polygon(10% 0%, 90% 0%, 95% 100%, 5% 100%); }
  32%  { stroke: #ffffff; fill: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); stroke-width: 4px; clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 75% 100%, 25% 100%); }
  48%  { stroke: #dd55ff; fill: rgba(180,30,200,0.1);  stroke-width: 3px; clip-path: polygon(3% 0%, 97% 0%, 90% 100%, 10% 100%); }
  64%  { stroke: #ffffff; fill: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); stroke-width: 6px; clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 80% 100%, 20% 100%); }
  80%  { stroke: #aaddff; fill: rgba(100,200,255,0.1);  stroke-width: 2px; clip-path: polygon(8% 0%, 92% 0%, 88% 100%, 12% 100%); }
  100% { stroke: #ffffff; fill: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); stroke-width: 4px; clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 80% 100%, 20% 100%); }
}

@keyframes lightning-skew {
  0%   { transform: skewX(-8deg)  scaleX(1); }
  15%  { transform: skewX(12deg)  scaleX(1.05); }
  30%  { transform: skewX(-15deg) scaleX(0.95); }
  45%  { transform: skewX(10deg)  scaleX(1.03); }
  60%  { transform: skewX(-6deg)  scaleX(1); }
  75%  { transform: skewX(14deg)  scaleX(1.04); }
  90%  { transform: skewX(-10deg) scaleX(0.98); }
  100% { transform: skewX(-8deg)  scaleX(1); }
}

@keyframes lightning-dash {
  from { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  to   { stroke-dashoffset: -80; }
}

@keyframes shadow-stretch {
  0%   { transform: skewX(-8deg)  scaleX(2.5) translateX(30px); opacity: 0.5; }
  25%  { transform: skewX(15deg)  scaleX(1.8) translateX(-20px); opacity: 0.7; }
  50%  { transform: skewX(-18deg) scaleX(2.8) translateX(40px); opacity: 0.4; }
  75%  { transform: skewX(12deg)  scaleX(2.0) translateX(-15px); opacity: 0.6; }
  100% { transform: skewX(-8deg)  scaleX(2.5) translateX(30px); opacity: 0.5; }
}

@keyframes branch-appear {
  0%   { opacity: 0; stroke-dashoffset: 100; }
  20%  { opacity: 1; stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  50%  { opacity: 0; stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 0; stroke-dashoffset: 100; }
}
</style>

Geometric shapes translating inward toward a center point where their clip-paths narrow and sharpen as they converge, each shape's stroke-width fattens progressively (1px to 3px), stroke-color builds from muted gray to vibrant blue, and overlapping shadows darken suggesting compression depth in staggered timing.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="depth-shadow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
      <feFlood flood-color="rgba(0,20,80,0.5)" result="color"/>
      <feComposite in="color" in2="blur" operator="in" result="s"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="s"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="300" height="300" fill="#f0f2f8"/>

  <!-- Outermost ring of shapes -->
  <g class="layer l1">
    <rect class="shape s1" x="30" y="30" width="60" height="60" rx="4"
          fill="none" stroke="#aab0c0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect class="shape s2" x="210" y="30" width="60" height="60" rx="4"
          fill="none" stroke="#aab0c0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect class="shape s3" x="30" y="210" width="60" height="60" rx="4"
          fill="none" stroke="#aab0c0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect class="shape s4" x="210" y="210" width="60" height="60" rx="4"
          fill="none" stroke="#aab0c0" stroke-width="1"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Middle ring -->
  <g class="layer l2">
    <polygon class="shape s5" points="150,70 175,110 125,110"
             fill="none" stroke="#7080a8" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <polygon class="shape s6" points="230,150 190,175 190,125"
             fill="none" stroke="#7080a8" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <polygon class="shape s7" points="150,230 125,190 175,190"
             fill="none" stroke="#7080a8" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <polygon class="shape s8" points="70,150 110,125 110,175"
             fill="none" stroke="#7080a8" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Inner ring -->
  <g class="layer l3">
    <circle class="shape s9"  cx="150" cy="110" r="18" fill="none" stroke="#3050cc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle class="shape s10" cx="190" cy="150" r="18" fill="none" stroke="#3050cc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle class="shape s11" cx="150" cy="190" r="18" fill="none" stroke="#3050cc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle class="shape s12" cx="110" cy="150" r="18" fill="none" stroke="#3050cc" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Center convergence point -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="6" fill="#1530ff" opacity="0.9">
    <animate attributeName="r" values="4;8;4" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.9;0.5;0.9" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </circle>
</svg>

<style>
/* Layer 1 - outer rectangles */
.l1 .shape {
  animation: converge-outer 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.s1 { transform-origin: 60px 60px;   animation-delay: 0s; }

.s3 { transform-origin: 60px 240px;  animation-delay: 0s; }

.s2 { transform-box: fill-box; animation: converge-s2 3s ease-in-out infinite 0s; }
.s3 { transform-box: fill-box; animation: converge-s3 3s ease-in-out infinite 0s; }
.s4 { transform-box: fill-box; animation: converge-s4 3s ease-in-out infinite 0s; }

/* Layer 2 - middle triangles */
.s5, .s6, .s7, .s8 {
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  transform-box: view-box;
}
.s5 { animation: converge-mid 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.3s; }

@keyframes converge-s1 {

  100% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1);           stroke: #aab0c0; stroke-width: 1px;    clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 2px rgba(0,20,80,0.1)); }

  40%  { transform: translate(-40px,40px) scale(0.75);  stroke: #506090; stroke-width: 1.8px;  clip-path: polygon(10% 0%, 90% 0%, 85% 100%, 15% 100%); filter: drop-shadow(-4px 4px 5px rgba(0,20,80,0.3)); }
  75%  { transform: translate(-72px,72px) scale(0.45);  stroke: #2040bb; stroke-width: 2.6px;  clip-path: polygon(25% 0%, 75% 0%, 70% 100%, 30% 100%); filter: drop-shadow(-6px 6px 8px rgba(0,20,80,0.5)); }
  90%  { transform: translate(-85px,85px) scale(0.2);   stroke: #1530ff; stroke-width: 3px;    clip-path: polygon(40% 0%, 60% 0%, 55% 100%, 45% 100%); filter: drop-shadow(-8px 8px 10px rgba(0,20,80,0.7)); }
  100% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1);            stroke: #aab0c0; stroke-width: 1px;    clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); filter: drop-shadow(-2px 2px 2px rgba(0,20,80,0.1)); }
}
@keyframes converge-s3 {
  0%   { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1);            stroke: #aab0c0; stroke-width: 1px;   filter: drop-shadow(2px -2px 2px rgba(0,20,80,0.1)); }
  40%  { transform: translate(40px,-40px) scale(0.75);  stroke: #506090; stroke-width: 1.8px;  filter: drop-shadow(4px -4px 5px rgba(0,20,80,0.3)); }
  75%  { transform: translate(72px,-72px) scale(0.45);  stroke: #2040bb; stroke-width: 2.6px;  filter: drop-shadow(6px -6px 8px rgba(0,20,80,0.5)); }
  90%  { transform: translate(85px,-85px) scale(0.2);   stroke: #1530ff; stroke-width: 3px;    filter: drop-shadow(8px -8px 10px rgba(0,20,80,0.7)); }
  100% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1);            stroke: #aab0c0; stroke-width: 1px;    filter: drop-shadow(2px -2px 2px rgba(0,20,80,0.1)); }
}
@keyframes converge-s4 {
  0%   { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1);             stroke: #aab0c0; stroke-width: 1px;   filter: drop-shadow(-2px -2px 2px rgba(0,20,80,0.1)); }
  40%  { transform: translate(-40px,-40px) scale(0.75);  stroke: #506090; stroke-width: 1.8px;  filter: drop-shadow(-4px -4px 5px rgba(0,20,80,0.3)); }
  75%  { transform: translate(-72px,-72px) scale(0.45);  stroke: #2040bb; stroke-width: 2.6px;  filter: drop-shadow(-6px -6px 8px rgba(0,20,80,0.5)); }
  90%  { transform: translate(-85px,-85px) scale(0.2);   stroke: #1530ff; stroke-width: 3px;    filter: drop-shadow(-8px -8px 10px rgba(0,20,80,0.7)); }
  100% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1);             stroke: #aab0c0; stroke-width: 1px;    filter: drop-shadow(-2px -2px 2px rgba(0,20,80,0.1)); }
}

@keyframes converge-mid {
  0%   { transform: scale(1);    stroke: #7080a8; stroke-width: 1.5px; opacity: 1;   filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 4px rgba(0,20,80,0.15)); }
  50%  { transform: scale(0.55); stroke: #3050cc; stroke-width: 2.2px; opacity: 0.9; filter: drop-shadow(3px 3px 7px rgba(0,20,80,0.4)); }
  85%  { transform: scale(0.2);  stroke: #1530ff; stroke-width: 3px;   opacity: 0.7; filter: drop-shadow(5px 5px 10px rgba(0,20,80,0.6)); }
  100% { transform: scale(1);    stroke: #7080a8; stroke-width: 1.5px; opacity: 1;   filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 4px rgba(0,20,80,0.15)); }
}

@keyframes converge-inner {
  0%   { transform: scale(1);   stroke: #3050cc; stroke-width: 2px;   opacity: 1;   filter: drop-shadow(1px 1px 3px rgba(0,20,80,0.2)); }
  50%  { transform: scale(0.6); stroke: #2040ee; stroke-width: 2.6px; opacity: 0.85; filter: drop-shadow(3px 3px 6px rgba(0,20,80,0.5)); }
  85%  { transform: scale(0.2); stroke: #0010ff; stroke-width: 3px;   opacity: 0.6;  filter: drop-shadow(5px 5px 9px rgba(0,20,80,0.8)); }
  100% { transform: scale(1);   stroke: #3050cc; stroke-width: 2px;   opacity: 1;   filter: drop-shadow(1px 1px 3px rgba(0,20,80,0.2)); }
}
</style>

A spinning top where the base rotates rapidly while its clip-path creates a cone shape that oscillates wider and narrower, the spinning motion's stroke-dasharray animates as concentric circles expanding outward, stroke-color ripples through warm-to-cool gradient, and a soft shadow beneath widens as rotation slows.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="topGrad" cx="50%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="#ff6633" class="top-color-0"/>
      <stop offset="40%"  stop-color="#cc3399" class="top-color-40"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3366ff" class="top-color-100"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="shadowGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="rgba(0,0,0,0.35)"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="rgba(0,0,0,0)"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <filter id="top-glow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="300" height="300" fill="#1a1a2e"/>

  <!-- Ground shadow -->
  <ellipse class="top-shadow" cx="150" cy="262" rx="40" ry="10" fill="url(#shadowGrad)"/>

  <!-- Spinning top body -->
  <g class="top-group" filter="url(#top-glow)">
    <!-- Cone body of top -->
    <polygon class="top-body" points="150,80 195,220 105,220" fill="url(#topGrad)"/>
    <!-- Top cap -->
    <ellipse class="top-cap" cx="150" cy="80" rx="18" ry="7" fill="#ff9944"/>
    <!-- Base disc -->
    <ellipse class="top-base" cx="150" cy="220" rx="45" ry="14" fill="#cc3399"/>
    <!-- Tip -->
    <line x1="150" y1="220" x2="150" y2="260" stroke="#888" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- Concentric circle rings -->
    <ellipse class="ring r1" cx="150" cy="140" rx="30" ry="9" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,150,0.7)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <ellipse class="ring r2" cx="150" cy="158" rx="38" ry="11" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,150,100,0.6)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <ellipse class="ring r3" cx="150" cy="176" rx="43" ry="12" fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,100,255,0.5)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <ellipse class="ring r4" cx="150" cy="194" rx="46" ry="13" fill="none" stroke="rgba(80,200,255,0.4)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Wobble indicator line -->
  <line class="wobble-line" x1="150" y1="80" x2="150" y2="50" stroke="rgba(255,200,100,0.6)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>

<style>
.top-group {
  transform-origin: 150px 260px;
  transform-box: view-box;
  animation: top-spin 0.15s linear infinite, top-wobble 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.top-body {
  animation: top-cone-shape 3s ease-in-out infinite, top-color-ripple 1.2s linear infinite;
}

.top-cap {
  animation: cap-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.top-base {
  animation: base-spin 0.15s linear infinite, base-wobble 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 220px;
  transform-box: view-box;
}

.top-shadow {
  transform-origin: 150px 262px;
  transform-box: view-box;
  animation: shadow-wobble 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.ring {
  stroke-dasharray: 10 5;
  animation: ring-expand 1.2s ease-out infinite, ring-dash 0.3s linear infinite;
}

.r1 { animation-delay: 0s, 0s; }
.r2 { animation-delay: 0.2s, 0.05s; }
.r3 { animation-delay: 0.4s, 0.10s; }
.r4 { animation-delay: 0.6s, 0.15s; }

.wobble-line {
  transform-origin: 150px 260px;
  transform-box: view-box;
  animation: wobble-line-anim 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes top-spin {
  from { transform: rotateY(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotateY(360deg); }
}

@keyframes top-wobble {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg);   }
  15%  { transform: rotate(-4deg);  }
  30%  { transform: rotate(3deg);   }
  45%  { transform: rotate(-2deg);  }
  60%  { transform: rotate(2.5deg); }
  75%  { transform: rotate(-1.5deg);}
  90%  { transform: rotate(1deg);   }
  100% { transform: rotate(0deg);   }
}

@keyframes top-cone-shape {
  0%   { clip-path: polygon(38% 0%, 62% 0%, 75% 100%, 25% 100%); }
  25%  { clip-path: polygon(35% 0%, 65% 0%, 78% 100%, 22% 100%); }
  50%  { clip-path: polygon(40% 0%, 60% 0%, 72% 100%, 28% 100%); }
  75%  { clip-path: polygon(36% 0%, 64% 0%, 77% 100%, 23% 100%); }
  100% { clip-path: polygon(38% 0%, 62% 0%, 75% 100%, 25% 100%); }
}

@keyframes top-color-ripple {
  0%   { fill: url(#topGrad); }
  33%  { fill: url(#topGradB); }
  66%  { fill: url(#topGradC); }
  100% { fill: url(#topGrad); }
}

@keyframes cap-pulse {
  0%   { ry: 7px; fill: #ff9944; }
  30%  { ry: 9px; fill: #ffcc44; }
  60%  { ry: 6px; fill: #ff6633; }
  100% { ry: 7px; fill: #ff9944; }
}

@keyframes base-spin {
  0%   { rx: 45px; }
  25%  { rx: 48px; }
  50%  { rx: 44px; }
  75%  { rx: 47px; }
  100% { rx: 45px; }
}

@keyframes base-wobble {
  0%   { fill: #cc3399; }
  33%  { fill: #3366ff; }
  66%  { fill: #ff6633; }
  100% { fill: #cc3399; }
}

@keyframes shadow-wobble {
  0%   { rx: 30px; ry: 8px;  opacity: 0.6; }
  25%  { rx: 42px; ry: 12px; opacity: 0.5; }
  50%  { rx: 35px; ry: 9px;  opacity: 0.55; }
  75%  { rx: 44px; ry: 13px; opacity: 0.45; }
  100% { rx: 30px; ry: 8px;  opacity: 0.6; }
}

@keyframes ring-expand {
  0%   { opacity: 0.9; stroke-width: 2px; }
  50%  { opacity: 0.5; stroke-width: 1px; }
  100% { opacity: 0.9; stroke-width: 2px; }
}

@keyframes ring-dash {
  from { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  to   { stroke-dashoffset: -30; }
}

@keyframes wobble-line-anim {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg);  opacity: 0.6; }
  20%  { transform: rotate(-6deg); opacity: 0.8; }
  40%  { transform: rotate(5deg);  opacity: 0.6; }
  60%  { transform: rotate(-3deg); opacity: 0.7; }
  80%  { transform: rotate(4deg);  opacity: 0.5; }
  100% { transform: rotate(0deg);  opacity: 0.6; }
}
</style>

A blooming flower where six petals scale outward from center in staggered 100ms sequence while rotating clockwise, each petal's border-radius softens from sharp angular points to rounded lobes as scale increases, the petal's stroke-dasharray animates as rippling waves outward, and stroke-color sequences through yellow-orange-red warm gradient.

<svg viewBox="-150 -150 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <g class="flower">
    <ellipse class="petal p1" cx="0" cy="-55" rx="18" ry="32"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p2" cx="0" cy="-55" rx="18" ry="32"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p3" cx="0" cy="-55" rx="18" ry="32"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p4" cx="0" cy="-55" rx="18" ry="32"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p5" cx="0" cy="-55" rx="18" ry="32"/>
    <ellipse class="petal p6" cx="0" cy="-55" rx="18" ry="32"/>
    <circle class="center" cx="0" cy="0" r="14"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.flower { transform-origin: 0 0; animation: flowerSpin 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
@keyframes flowerSpin {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
.petal {
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 2.5;
  transform-origin: 0 0;
  stroke-dasharray: 140;
  stroke-dashoffset: 140;
}
.p1 { transform: rotate(0deg);   animation: bloom 3s 0.0s ease-in-out infinite, dash1 3s 0.0s ease-in-out infinite, colorCycle 3s 0.0s ease-in-out infinite; }
.p2 { transform: rotate(60deg);  animation: bloom 3s 0.1s ease-in-out infinite, dash1 3s 0.1s ease-in-out infinite, colorCycle 3s 0.1s ease-in-out infinite; }
.p3 { transform: rotate(120deg); animation: bloom 3s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite, dash1 3s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite, colorCycle 3s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite; }
.p4 { transform: rotate(180deg); animation: bloom 3s 0.3s ease-in-out infinite, dash1 3s 0.3s ease-in-out infinite, colorCycle 3s 0.3s ease-in-out infinite; }
.p5 { transform: rotate(240deg); animation: bloom 3s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite, dash1 3s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite, colorCycle 3s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.p6 { transform: rotate(300deg); animation: bloom 3s 0.5s ease-in-out infinite, dash1 3s 0.5s ease-in-out infinite, colorCycle 3s 0.5s ease-in-out infinite; }

@keyframes bloom {
  0%   { transform: rotate(var(--r,0deg)) scale(0.1); rx: 4; ry: 8; }
  40%  { transform: rotate(var(--r,0deg)) scale(1.15); rx: 20; ry: 36; }
  60%  { transform: rotate(var(--r,0deg)) scale(1.0);  rx: 18; ry: 32; }
  80%  { transform: rotate(var(--r,0deg)) scale(1.05); }
  100% { transform: rotate(var(--r,0deg)) scale(0.1); rx: 4; ry: 8; }
}
.p1 { --r: 0deg; }
.p2 { --r: 60deg; }
.p3 { --r: 120deg; }
.p4 { --r: 180deg; }
.p5 { --r: 240deg; }
.p6 { --r: 300deg; }

@keyframes dash1 {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 140; stroke-dasharray: 140 0; }
  20%  { stroke-dashoffset: 0;   stroke-dasharray: 60 80; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: -80; stroke-dasharray: 30 110; }
  80%  { stroke-dashoffset: -140; stroke-dasharray: 10 130; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 140; stroke-dasharray: 140 0; }
}
@keyframes colorCycle {
  0%   { stroke: #FFE033; }
  25%  { stroke: #FF9A00; }
  55%  { stroke: #FF4400; }
  80%  { stroke: #FF6600; }
  100% { stroke: #FFE033; }
}
.center {
  fill: #FFD700;
  stroke: #FF8C00;
  stroke-width: 2;
  animation: centerPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes centerPulse {
  0%,100% { r: 8;  fill: #FFD700; }
  40%      { r: 14; fill: #FF6600; }
  60%      { r: 12; fill: #FF9900; }
}
</style>

A stretching rubber band where the center translates while both ends anchor and the shape skews into a parabolic curve, stroke-width surges at maximum stretch, stroke-color flashes red-on-release suggesting tension, and border-radius rounds during stretch.

<svg viewBox="-160 -80 320 160" width="300" height="160" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="bandGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FF6060"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4488FF"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  <!-- anchor dots -->
  <circle class="anchor left-a"  cx="-130" cy="0" r="7" fill="#223"/>
  <circle class="anchor right-a" cx="130"  cy="0" r="7" fill="#223"/>
  <!-- rubber band body -->
  <path class="band" d="M-123,0 Q0,0 123,0" fill="none" stroke="url(#bandGrad)" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- center indicator -->
  <circle class="midpt" cx="0" cy="0" r="5" fill="#FF4444"/>
</svg>
<style>
.band {
  stroke-width: 5;
  animation: stretch 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes stretch {
  0%   { d: path("M-123,0 Q0,0 123,0");         stroke-width:5;  stroke:#4488FF; border-radius:0; }
  25%  { d: path("M-123,0 Q0,-55 123,0");        stroke-width:9;  stroke:#8844DD; }
  45%  { d: path("M-123,0 Q0,-90 123,0");        stroke-width:14; stroke:#FF4400; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px #FF440099); }
  55%  { d: path("M-123,0 Q0,-90 123,0");        stroke-width:14; stroke:#FF2200; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px #FF220099); }
  65%  { d: path("M-123,0 Q0,-20 123,0");        stroke-width:6;  stroke:#FF8800; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 3px #FF880055); }
  75%  { d: path("M-123,0 Q0,10 123,0");         stroke-width:4;  stroke:#FFAA00; filter: none; }
  85%  { d: path("M-123,0 Q0,-4 123,0");         stroke-width:5;  stroke:#6688FF; }
  100% { d: path("M-123,0 Q0,0 123,0");          stroke-width:5;  stroke:#4488FF; }
}
.midpt {
  animation: midMove 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes midMove {
  0%   { cy:0;   fill:#4488FF; r:4; }
  25%  { cy:-55; fill:#AA44DD; r:5; }
  45%  { cy:-90; fill:#FF4400; r:7; }
  55%  { cy:-90; fill:#FF2200; r:8; }
  65%  { cy:-20; fill:#FF8800; r:6; }
  75%  { cy:10;  fill:#FFAA00; r:5; }
  85%  { cy:-4;  fill:#6688FF; r:4; }
  100% { cy:0;   fill:#4488FF; r:4; }
}
.left-a, .right-a {
  animation: anchorPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes anchorPulse {
  0%,85%,100% { r:7; fill:#223; }
  45%,55%     { r:9; fill:#442233; }
}
</style>

A tilted spinning coin where the circle skews into elliptical flatness while rotating rapidly, the coin's stroke-width modulates from thick-to-thin-to-thick as it spins, stroke-color shifts cool-to-warm during rotation, and shadow beneath elongates on tilt.

<svg viewBox="-150 -150 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="coinFace" cx="40%" cy="35%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFF3A0"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#D4A800"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7A5800"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="coinFace2" cx="60%" cy="65%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#B0D8FF"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#5588CC"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1A2A5A"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- shadow -->
  <ellipse class="shadow" cx="0" cy="105" rx="60" ry="10" fill="#00000044"/>

  <!-- coin body -->
  <ellipse class="coin" cx="0" cy="0" rx="90" ry="90" fill="url(#coinFace)" stroke="#C8960C" stroke-width="5"/>
  <!-- coin inner ring -->
  <ellipse class="coin-ring" cx="0" cy="0" rx="72" ry="72" fill="none" stroke="#E8B820" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="30 10"/>
  <!-- coin center mark -->
  <text class="coin-text" x="0" y="12" text-anchor="middle" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" fill="#7A5800" opacity="0.6">$</text>
</svg>
<style>
.coin {
  transform-origin: 0 0;
  animation: coinSpin 2s linear infinite, coinColor 2s linear infinite, coinStroke 2s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes coinSpin {
  0%   { ry: 90;  transform: rotate(-8deg); }
  10%  { ry: 60;  transform: rotate(-5deg); }
  20%  { ry: 10;  transform: rotate(0deg); }
  25%  { ry: 2;   transform: rotate(2deg); }
  30%  { ry: 10;  transform: rotate(5deg); }
  40%  { ry: 60;  transform: rotate(8deg); }
  50%  { ry: 90;  transform: rotate(10deg); }
  60%  { ry: 60;  transform: rotate(8deg); }
  70%  { ry: 10;  transform: rotate(0deg); }
  75%  { ry: 2;   transform: rotate(-2deg); }
  80%  { ry: 10;  transform: rotate(-5deg); }
  90%  { ry: 60;  transform: rotate(-8deg); }
  100% { ry: 90;  transform: rotate(-8deg); }
}
@keyframes coinColor {
  0%,100% { fill: url(#coinFace);  }
  20%,30% { fill: url(#coinFace2); }
  70%,80% { fill: url(#coinFace2); }
}
@keyframes coinStroke {
  0%,100% { stroke-width:5;  stroke:#C8960C; }
  20%,80% { stroke-width:10; stroke:#8899DD; }
  25%,75% { stroke-width:2;  stroke:#3355AA; }
  30%,70% { stroke-width:8;  stroke:#99AAFF; }
  50%     { stroke-width:5;  stroke:#C8960C; }
}
.coin-ring {
  transform-origin: 0 0;
  animation: ringSync 2s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes ringSync {
  0%   { ry:72; transform:rotate(-8deg); stroke-dasharray:30 10; }
  20%  { ry:8;  transform:rotate(0deg);  stroke-dasharray:5 35; }
  25%  { ry:1;  transform:rotate(2deg);  stroke-dasharray:2 38; }
  30%  { ry:8;  transform:rotate(5deg);  stroke-dasharray:5 35; }
  50%  { ry:72; transform:rotate(10deg); stroke-dasharray:30 10; }
  70%  { ry:8;  transform:rotate(0deg);  stroke-dasharray:5 35; }
  75%  { ry:1;  transform:rotate(-2deg); stroke-dasharray:2 38; }
  80%  { ry:8;  transform:rotate(-5deg); stroke-dasharray:5 35; }
  100% { ry:72; transform:rotate(-8deg); stroke-dasharray:30 10; }
}
.coin-text {
  transform-origin: 0 0;
  animation: textSync 2s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes textSync {
  0%   { transform:rotate(-8deg) scaleY(1);    opacity:0.6; }
  20%  { transform:rotate(0deg)  scaleY(0.09); opacity:0.1; }
  25%  { transform:rotate(2deg)  scaleY(0.02); opacity:0;   }
  30%  { transform:rotate(5deg)  scaleY(0.09); opacity:0.1; }
  50%  { transform:rotate(10deg) scaleY(1);    opacity:0.6; }
  70%  { transform:rotate(0deg)  scaleY(0.09); opacity:0.1; }
  75%  { transform:rotate(-2deg) scaleY(0.02); opacity:0;   }
  80%  { transform:rotate(-5deg) scaleY(0.09); opacity:0.1; }
  100% { transform:rotate(-8deg) scaleY(1);    opacity:0.6; }
}
.shadow {
  transform-origin: 0 105px;
  animation: shadowAnim 2s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes shadowAnim {
  0%,100% { rx:60; opacity:0.27; transform:scaleX(1); }
  20%     { rx:30; opacity:0.18; transform:scaleX(0.6); }
  25%     { rx:10; opacity:0.10; transform:scaleX(0.2); }
  50%     { rx:60; opacity:0.27; transform:scaleX(1); }
  70%     { rx:30; opacity:0.18; transform:scaleX(0.6); }
  75%     { rx:10; opacity:0.10; transform:scaleX(0.2); }
}
</style>

A bending wire where the entire path skews forward then backward creating whip motion while stroke-dasharray pulses as electrical current, stroke-color flashes white-purple-blue in rapid bursts, and clip-path masks portions creating reveal effect.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <clipPath id="wireClip">
      <rect class="clip-rect" x="0" y="0" width="300" height="300"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>
  <g clip-path="url(#wireClip)">
    <path class="wire wire1" d="M 20,150 C 60,80 100,220 140,150 C 180,80 220,220 280,150" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path class="wire wire2" d="M 20,150 C 60,80 100,220 140,150 C 180,80 220,220 280,150" fill="none" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
svg { display: block; }

.clip-rect {
  animation: clipReveal 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes clipReveal {
  0%   { x: 0; width: 300px; }
  25%  { x: 40px; width: 220px; }
  50%  { x: 0; width: 300px; }
  75%  { x: -20px; width: 340px; }
  100% { x: 0; width: 300px; }
}

.wire1 {
  stroke: #bb44ff;
  stroke-dasharray: 60 20 30 10;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  animation: whip1 1.2s ease-in-out infinite, dash1 0.4s linear infinite, color1 0.3s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes whip1 {
  0%   { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
  15%  { transform: skewX(18deg) skewY(4deg); }
  30%  { transform: skewX(-14deg) skewY(-3deg); }
  50%  { transform: skewX(10deg) skewY(2deg); }
  70%  { transform: skewX(-8deg) skewY(-2deg); }
  85%  { transform: skewX(4deg) skewY(1deg); }
  100% { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
}

@keyframes dash1 {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 60 20 30 10; stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  25%  { stroke-dasharray: 80 10 10 20; stroke-dashoffset: -30; }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 40 30 50 5;  stroke-dashoffset: -60; }
  75%  { stroke-dasharray: 20 10 80 15; stroke-dashoffset: -90; }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 60 20 30 10; stroke-dashoffset: -120; }
}

@keyframes color1 {
  0%   { stroke: #cc44ff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 3px #cc44ff); }
  20%  { stroke: #ffffff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px #ffffff); }
  40%  { stroke: #4488ff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #4488ff); }
  60%  { stroke: #ffffff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px #ffffff); }
  80%  { stroke: #aa22ff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #aa22ff); }
  100% { stroke: #cc44ff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 3px #cc44ff); }
}

.wire2 {
  stroke: #ffffff;
  stroke-dasharray: 10 40;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  animation: whip2 1.2s ease-in-out infinite, dash2 0.6s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes whip2 {
  0%   { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
  15%  { transform: skewX(-16deg) skewY(-3deg); }
  30%  { transform: skewX(12deg) skewY(2deg); }
  50%  { transform: skewX(-9deg) skewY(-2deg); }
  70%  { transform: skewX(6deg) skewY(1deg); }
  85%  { transform: skewX(-3deg) skewY(-1deg); }
  100% { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
}

@keyframes dash2 {
  from { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  to   { stroke-dashoffset: -200; }
}
</style>

A pulsating heart where the outline skews inward-outward rhythmically while border-radius cycles from angular points to rounded bumps, stroke-width surges in three beats, stroke-color flashes red-white-red, and inner shadow inverts creating pressure pulse.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="innerShadow">
      <feFlood flood-color="#ff0033" flood-opacity="0.6" result="color"/>
      <feComposite in="color" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in" result="inner"/>
      <feGaussianBlur in="inner" stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
      <feComposite in="blur" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="over"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="innerShadowInvert">
      <feFlood flood-color="#ffffff" flood-opacity="0.9" result="color"/>
      <feComposite in="color" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in" result="inner"/>
      <feGaussianBlur in="inner" stdDeviation="6" result="blur"/>
      <feComposite in="blur" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="over"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <path class="heart" d="M150,210 C100,175 55,155 55,115 C55,85 75,68 100,68 C120,68 138,80 150,95 C162,80 180,68 200,68 C225,68 245,85 245,115 C245,155 200,175 150,210 Z"/>
</svg>
<style>
svg { display: block; }

.heart {
  fill: #cc0022;
  stroke: #ff0033;
  stroke-width: 3;
  transform-origin: 150px 145px;
  animation: heartbeat 1.1s ease-in-out infinite, strokePulse 1.1s ease-in-out infinite, colorFlash 1.1s linear infinite, skewPulse 1.1s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes heartbeat {
  0%   { transform: scale(1) skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
  10%  { transform: scale(1.12) skewX(-3deg) skewY(-2deg); }
  20%  { transform: scale(0.96) skewX(2deg) skewY(1deg); }
  30%  { transform: scale(1.18) skewX(-4deg) skewY(-3deg); }
  45%  { transform: scale(0.94) skewX(3deg) skewY(2deg); }
  55%  { transform: scale(1.08) skewX(-2deg) skewY(-1deg); }
  70%  { transform: scale(0.97) skewX(1deg) skewY(1deg); }
  85%  { transform: scale(1.03) skewX(-1deg) skewY(0deg); }
  100% { transform: scale(1) skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
}

@keyframes skewPulse {
  0%   { d: path("M150,210 C100,175 55,155 55,115 C55,85 75,68 100,68 C120,68 138,80 150,95 C162,80 180,68 200,68 C225,68 245,85 245,115 C245,155 200,175 150,210 Z"); }
  10%  { d: path("M150,215 C95,178 50,152 52,110 C53,78 74,62 100,64 C122,64 140,78 150,94 C160,78 178,64 200,64 C226,62 247,78 248,110 C250,152 205,178 150,215 Z"); }
  30%  { d: path("M150,205 C105,172 60,158 58,118 C57,88 76,72 100,72 C119,72 137,82 150,96 C163,82 181,72 200,72 C224,72 243,88 242,118 C240,158 195,172 150,205 Z"); }
  55%  { d: path("M150,212 C98,176 53,154 53,112 C53,82 74,65 100,66 C121,66 139,79 150,95 C161,79 179,66 200,66 C226,65 247,82 247,112 C247,154 202,176 150,212 Z"); }
  100% { d: path("M150,210 C100,175 55,155 55,115 C55,85 75,68 100,68 C120,68 138,80 150,95 C162,80 180,68 200,68 C225,68 245,85 245,115 C245,155 200,175 150,210 Z"); }
}

@keyframes strokePulse {
  0%   { stroke-width: 2.5; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #ff0033); }
  10%  { stroke-width: 6;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 12px #ff3355); }
  20%  { stroke-width: 2;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 3px #ff0033); }
  30%  { stroke-width: 8;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px #ff6688); }
  45%  { stroke-width: 2;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 3px #ff0033); }
  55%  { stroke-width: 5;   filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px #ff2244); }
  70%  { stroke-width: 2.5; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #ff0033); }
  100% { stroke-width: 2.5; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #ff0033); }
}

@keyframes colorFlash {
  0%   { stroke: #ff0033; fill: #cc0022; }
  10%  { stroke: #ff4466; fill: #ee1133; }
  20%  { stroke: #ffffff; fill: #ff8899; }
  30%  { stroke: #ff0033; fill: #cc0022; }
  45%  { stroke: #ffffff; fill: #ffaabb; }
  55%  { stroke: #ff0033; fill: #cc0022; }
  75%  { stroke: #ff2244; fill: #dd0022; }
  100% { stroke: #ff0033; fill: #cc0022; }
}
</style>

A twisting DNA helix where two strands skew on opposing diagonal angles while rotating upward, stroke-dasharray chases bidirectionally at staggered speeds, stroke-color sequences cyan-magenta-blue in cascading waves, and shadows amplify helical depth.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="helixGlow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2.5" result="blur"/>
      <feComposite in="SourceGraphic" in2="blur" operator="over"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <!-- Strand A -->
  <path class="strand strandA" d="M100,280 C130,250 170,230 200,200 C170,170 130,150 100,120 C130,90 170,70 200,40 C170,10 130,-10 100,-40" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- Strand B -->
  <path class="strand strandB" d="M200,280 C170,250 130,230 100,200 C130,170 170,150 200,120 C170,90 130,70 100,40 C130,10 170,-10 200,-40" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- Rungs -->
  <line class="rung r1" x1="113" y1="240" x2="187" y2="240" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line class="rung r2" x1="126" y1="200" x2="174" y2="200" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line class="rung r3" x1="126" y1="160" x2="174" y2="160" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line class="rung r4" x1="113" y1="120" x2="187" y2="120" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line class="rung r5" x1="126" y1="80"  x2="174" y2="80"  stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>
<style>
svg { display: block; overflow: visible; }

.strandA {
  stroke: #00ffff;
  stroke-dasharray: 30 15 20 10;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  animation: twistA 2s ease-in-out infinite, dashA 1.2s linear infinite, colorA 2.4s linear infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #00ffff) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #0088ff);
}

.strandB {
  stroke: #ff00cc;
  stroke-dasharray: 20 10 30 15;
  stroke-dashoffset: -40;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  animation: twistB 2s ease-in-out infinite, dashB 1.6s linear infinite, colorB 2.4s linear infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #ff00cc) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #cc00ff);
}

@keyframes twistA {
  0%   { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg) translateY(0px); }
  25%  { transform: skewX(12deg) skewY(-5deg) translateY(-15px); }
  50%  { transform: skewX(-8deg) skewY(4deg) translateY(-30px); }
  75%  { transform: skewX(10deg) skewY(-4deg) translateY(-15px); }
  100% { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg) translateY(0px); }
}

@keyframes twistB {
  0%   { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg) translateY(0px); }
  25%  { transform: skewX(-12deg) skewY(5deg) translateY(-15px); }
  50%  { transform: skewX(8deg) skewY(-4deg) translateY(-30px); }
  75%  { transform: skewX(-10deg) skewY(4deg) translateY(-15px); }
  100% { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg) translateY(0px); }
}

@keyframes dashA {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-dasharray: 30 15 20 10; }
  33%  { stroke-dashoffset: -60; stroke-dasharray: 20 10 35 15; }
  66%  { stroke-dashoffset: -20; stroke-dasharray: 40 8 15 20; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -120; stroke-dasharray: 30 15 20 10; }
}

@keyframes dashB {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: -40; stroke-dasharray: 20 10 30 15; }
  33%  { stroke-dashoffset: 0;   stroke-dasharray: 35 15 15 10; }
  66%  { stroke-dashoffset: -80; stroke-dasharray: 15 20 40 8; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -160; stroke-dasharray: 20 10 30 15; }
}

@keyframes colorA {
  0%   { stroke: #00ffff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #00ffff) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #0088ff); }
  33%  { stroke: #cc88ff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px #cc44ff) drop-shadow(0 0 16px #8800ff); }
  66%  { stroke: #4488ff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px #4488ff) drop-shadow(0 0 14px #0044ff); }
  100% { stroke: #00ffff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #00ffff) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #0088ff); }
}

@keyframes colorB {
  0%   { stroke: #ff00cc; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #ff00cc) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #cc00ff); }
  33%  { stroke: #00ffff; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 7px #00ffff) drop-shadow(0 0 14px #0088ff); }
  66%  { stroke: #ff44aa; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px #ff44aa) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #cc0066); }
  100% { stroke: #ff00cc; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #ff00cc) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #cc00ff); }
}

.rung {
  stroke: rgba(120,255,220,0.6);
  animation: rungPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.r1 { animation-delay: 0s; }
.r2 { animation-delay: -0.4s; }
.r3 { animation-delay: -0.8s; }
.r4 { animation-delay: -1.2s; }
.r5 { animation-delay: -1.6s; }

@keyframes rungPulse {
  0%   { stroke: rgba(120,255,220,0.5); stroke-width: 1.5; opacity: 0.5; }
  30%  { stroke: rgba(255,100,255,0.8); stroke-width: 3;   opacity: 0.9; }
  60%  { stroke: rgba(100,150,255,0.6); stroke-width: 2;   opacity: 0.6; }
  100% { stroke: rgba(120,255,220,0.5); stroke-width: 1.5; opacity: 0.5; }
}
</style>

Matrix-style falling glyphs descending in six staggered columns where each character's clip-path reveals from top-to-bottom in cascading waves, stroke animates as a neon-green glowing outline intensifying then fading, fill-color shifts from bright cyan through pale gray suggesting digital decay, and background-position scrolls vertically creating depth parallax.

An unfurling scroll where the clip-path reveals text from top-to-bottom in a wave pattern while border-radius on the scroll curl morphs sharp-to-rounded, the text's stroke animates as a glowing outline intensifying, stroke-color shifts pale-to-saturated gold, and shadow beneath deepens as scroll unfurls.

Herein lies

A web of interconnected nodes where clip-path on connecting lines creates dashing reveals while rotating bidirectionally, each line's stroke-color transitions cool-blue-to-warm-orange, stroke-width modulates along path suggesting flow direction, and layered shadows beneath create three-dimensional thread depth.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="web-svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="shadow1" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="3" stdDeviation="4" flood-color="rgba(0,80,180,0.5)"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="shadow2" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="5" stdDeviation="7" flood-color="rgba(0,40,120,0.35)"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2.5" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>

    <!-- Node glow -->
    <radialGradient id="nodeGrad" cx="50%" cy="30%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#aef"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0055cc"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <!-- Clip paths for lines (each covering respective path bbox roughly) -->
    <clipPath id="clip1"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="300"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="clip2"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="300"/></clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- Deep shadow layer (offset, blurred) -->
  <g class="shadow-layer" filter="url(#shadow2)" opacity="0.5">
    <!-- Lines shadow set -->
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="260" y2="130"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="220" y2="240"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="80"  y2="240"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="40"  y2="130"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="260" y1="130" x2="220" y2="240"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="220" y1="240" x2="80"  y2="240"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="80"  y1="240" x2="40"  y2="130"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="40"  y1="130" x2="260" y2="130"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="150" y2="170"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="260" y1="130" x2="150" y2="170"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="220" y1="240" x2="150" y2="170"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="80"  y1="240" x2="150" y2="170"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="40"  y1="130" x2="150" y2="170"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Rotating group (bidirectional via nested) -->
  <g class="rotate-cw" style="transform-origin:150px 150px">
    <g class="rotate-ccw-inner" style="transform-origin:150px 150px">

      <!-- Line 1: node0-node1 -->
      <line class="web-line l1" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="260" y2="130" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 2: node0-node2 -->
      <line class="web-line l2" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="220" y2="240" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 3: node0-node3 -->
      <line class="web-line l3" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="80"  y2="240" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 4: node0-node4 -->
      <line class="web-line l4" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="40"  y2="130" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 5: node1-node2 -->
      <line class="web-line l5" x1="260" y1="130" x2="220" y2="240" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 6: node2-node3 -->
      <line class="web-line l6" x1="220" y1="240" x2="80"  y2="240" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 7: node3-node4 -->
      <line class="web-line l7" x1="80"  y1="240" x2="40"  y2="130" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 8: node4-node1 -->
      <line class="web-line l8" x1="40"  y1="130" x2="260" y2="130" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Inner lines to center node5 -->
      <line class="web-line l9"  x1="150" y1="50"  x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <line class="web-line l10" x1="260" y1="130" x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <line class="web-line l11" x1="220" y1="240" x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <line class="web-line l12" x1="80"  y1="240" x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <line class="web-line l13" x1="40"  y1="130" x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>

      <!-- Nodes -->
      <circle class="node n0" cx="150" cy="50"  r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n1" cx="260" cy="130" r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n2" cx="220" cy="240" r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n3" cx="80"  cy="240" r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n4" cx="40"  cy="130" r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n5" cx="150" cy="170" r="11" filter="url(#glow)"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
.web-svg {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
  display: block;
}

/* Shadow lines style */
.sl {
  stroke: #003388;
  stroke-width: 4;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  opacity: 0.4;
}

/* Web lines base */
.web-line {
  stroke-linecap: round;
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 3;
}

/* Per-line color + dasharray animation */
.l1  { stroke-dasharray: 140; animation: dash1 2.8s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.8s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l2  { stroke-dasharray: 210; animation: dash2 3.1s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.1s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l3  { stroke-dasharray: 210; animation: dash3 3.4s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 0.8s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.4s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l4  { stroke-dasharray: 140; animation: dash4 2.6s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.2s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.6s 0.6s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l5  { stroke-dasharray: 120; animation: dash5 2.5s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.6s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.5s 0.8s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l6  { stroke-dasharray: 140; animation: dash6 3.0s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 2.0s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.0s 1.0s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l7  { stroke-dasharray: 120; animation: dash7 2.7s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 2.4s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.7s 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l8  { stroke-dasharray: 220; animation: dash8 3.3s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 2.8s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.3s 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l9  { stroke-dasharray: 120; animation: dash9  2.4s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 0.6s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.4s 0.3s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l10 { stroke-dasharray: 125; animation: dash10 2.9s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.0s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.9s 0.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l11 { stroke-dasharray: 100; animation: dash11 2.6s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.4s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.6s 0.7s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l12 { stroke-dasharray: 100; animation: dash12 2.3s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.8s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.3s 0.9s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l13 { stroke-dasharray: 125; animation: dash13 3.2s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 2.2s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.2s 1.1s ease-in-out infinite; }

/* Dash keyframes — offset goes full length → 0 (reveal) → back */
@keyframes dash1  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:140}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-140} }
@keyframes dash2  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:210}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-210} }
@keyframes dash3  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-210} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:210}  }
@keyframes dash4  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:140}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-140} }
@keyframes dash5  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-120} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:120}  }
@keyframes dash6  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:140}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-140} }
@keyframes dash7  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-120} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:120}  }
@keyframes dash8  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:220}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-220} }
@keyframes dash9  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-120} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:120}  }
@keyframes dash10 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:125}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-125} }
@keyframes dash11 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-100} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:100}  }
@keyframes dash12 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:100}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-100} }
@keyframes dash13 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-125} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:125}  }

/* Color: cool blue → warm orange */
@keyframes colorshift {
  0%   { stroke: #1a88ff; }
  25%  { stroke: #00ccdd; }
  50%  { stroke: #ff9900; }
  75%  { stroke: #ff5533; }
  100% { stroke: #1a88ff; }
}

/* Width modulation — simulates flow direction */
@keyframes widthpulse {
  0%   { stroke-width: 1.5; }
  30%  { stroke-width: 4.5; }
  60%  { stroke-width: 1.5; }
  80%  { stroke-width: 3.5; }
  100% { stroke-width: 1.5; }
}

/* Nodes */
.node {
  fill: url(#nodeGrad);
  stroke: #aaddff;
  stroke-width: 1.5;
  animation: nodepulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.n0 { animation-delay: 0s; }
.n1 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.n2 { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
.n3 { animation-delay: 0.9s; }
.n4 { animation-delay: 1.2s; }
.n5 { animation-delay: 1.5s; }

@keyframes nodepulse {
  0%,100% { r: 9;  opacity: 0.9; }
  50%      { r: 11; opacity: 1;   }
}
.n5 {
  animation: nodepulse5 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes nodepulse5 {
  0%,100% { r: 11; opacity: 0.9; }
  50%      { r: 14; opacity: 1;   }
}

/* Bidirectional rotation: outer CW, inner CCW at different speeds */
.rotate-cw {
  animation: rotateCW 12s linear infinite;
}
.rotate-ccw-inner {
  animation: rotateCCW 8s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes rotateCW {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
@keyframes rotateCCW {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(-360deg); }
}
</style>

Three concentric parallelograms that skew in opposite directions while counter-rotating, each shape's stroke-dasharray animates in opposite directions at staggered speeds, stroke-color ripples through complementary gradient pairs, and shadows cast at opposing angles create a twisting vortex effect with staggered timing between shapes.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">
  <polygon class="p p1" points="100,110 200,110 180,190 80,190" fill="none" stroke="#ff5f6d" stroke-width="4"/>
  <polygon class="p p2" points="115,125 185,125 170,175 100,175" fill="none" stroke="#36d1dc" stroke-width="4"/>
  <polygon class="p p3" points="130,140 170,140 160,160 120,160" fill="none" stroke="#ffd800" stroke-width="4"/>
</svg>
<style>
.p { transform-origin: 150px 150px; stroke-dasharray: 40; }
.p1 { animation: rot1 6s linear infinite, dash1 4s linear infinite, col1 5s ease-in-out infinite; filter: drop-shadow(6px 6px 4px #0006); }
.p2 { animation: rot2 6s linear infinite, dash2 3s linear infinite, col2 5s ease-in-out infinite -0.6s; filter: drop-shadow(-6px 6px 4px #0006); }
.p3 { animation: rot1 6s linear infinite -1.2s, dash1 2.5s linear infinite, col1 5s ease-in-out infinite -1.2s; filter: drop-shadow(6px -6px 4px #0006); }
@keyframes rot1 { 0% { transform: rotate(0) skewX(15deg);} 100%{ transform: rotate(360deg) skewX(15deg);} }
@keyframes rot2 { 0% { transform: rotate(0) skewX(-20deg);} 100%{ transform: rotate(-360deg) skewX(-20deg);} }
@keyframes dash1 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:0;} 100%{stroke-dashoffset:80;} }
@keyframes dash2 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:80;} 100%{stroke-dashoffset:0;} }
@keyframes col1 { 0%,100%{stroke:#ff5f6d;} 50%{stroke:#36d1dc;} }
@keyframes col2 { 0%,100%{stroke:#36d1dc;} 50%{stroke:#ff5f6d;} }
</style>

A morphing star that transforms through eight angular phases while rotating slowly (360 degrees per cycle), border-radius cycles from 0% razor-sharp points to 25% softly-rounded lobes in staggered phase offsets (each point offset by 45ms), the stroke animates as a color gradient flowing around the perimeter in opposing directions, and the shadow beneath intensifies as border-radius increases suggesting increased three-dimensional bulge.

A cascading confetti stream where twelve pieces translate downward at staggered speeds while their border-radius morphs from sharp corners to fully rounded mid-fall, each piece rotates on multiple axes, shadows stretch beneath each piece, and opacity fades from opaque to transparent creating a dimensional flutter effect with trailing shadow distortion.

An audio waveform visualization where eight vertical bars translate upward and downward at staggered 100ms intervals while their stroke-dasharray animates as glowing outlines, stroke-color ripples through a spectrum from cool blue through vibrant cyan to warm magenta in cascading waves, each bar's stroke-width modulates inversely with height (thin when tall, thick when short), and shadows beneath each bar stretch vertically then compress based on movement intensity.

A radial burst explosion where sixteen wedge-shaped clip-paths expand outward from center while rotating rapidly, each wedge's stroke-width scales inversely with distance suggesting perspective, stroke-color fades from bright white-yellow to transparent orange, and shadows stretch radially outward creating explosion depth.

A twisted ribbon unfurling where the stroke skews dramatically on sharp 45° angles while stroke-dasharray chases the entire length, stroke-width modulates from thin-to-thick creating tension, border-radius softens curve intersections, and color transitions gold-to-copper suggesting metallic twist.

<svg class="ribbon" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="240" height="240">
<path class="band" d="M30,100 C60,40 100,160 130,100 S180,40 190,100" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>
<style>
.ribbon { animation: twist 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.band {
  stroke: #ffd24d;
  stroke-width: 6;
  stroke-dasharray: 260;
  stroke-dashoffset: 260;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  animation: chase 3s linear infinite,
             tension 1.8s ease-in-out infinite,
             metal 2.4s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}
@keyframes twist {
  0%,100% { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
  25% { transform: skewX(45deg) skewY(-10deg); }
  50% { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
  75% { transform: skewX(-45deg) skewY(10deg); }
}
@keyframes chase {
  to { stroke-dashoffset: -260; }
}
@keyframes tension {
  0%,100% { stroke-width: 3; }
  50% { stroke-width: 14; }
}
@keyframes metal {
  0% { stroke: #ffd24d; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255,200,80,0.6)); }
  100% { stroke: #b5651d; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(180,100,30,0.7)); }
}
</style>
